    toc-location: body

    affiliations: "Rochester General Hospital, Rochester, New York, USA"

---

# Setup

## Libraries

```{r}
#Load libs
packs <- c("data.table", "dplyr", 
           "stringr", "haven", "PooledCohort",
           "ggplot2", "scales",  "survey",
           "flextable", "ggsci", "ggthemes",
           "scales", "Hmisc", "legendry",
           "forcats", "rms"
           )
lapply(packs, require, character.only = TRUE)
options(survey.lonely.psu = "adjust")
```

## Self-made functions

### Analytic

```{r}
#Quantiles
qs <- function(variable) quantile(variable, seq(0, 1, 0.05), na.rm = T)

#Functions to create PE/CI
make_pe_ci_mil <- function(pe, lci, uci) {
  paste0(pe %>% tomil,
         " [", lci %>% tomil, " to ", uci %>% tomil, "]") %>% str_replace("\\[ ", "\\[")
}

make_pe_ci <- function(pe, lci, uci, round_n = 1) {
  paste0(pe %>% round(round_n) %>% format(nsmall = round_n),
         " [", lci %>% round(round_n) %>% format(nsmall = round_n), " to ", uci %>% round(round_n) %>% format(nsmall = round_n), "]") %>% str_replace("\\[ ", "\\[")
}

make_prop_pe_ci <- function(prop_pe, prop_lci, prop_uci) {
paste0( (100*prop_pe) %>% r1,
                                " [", (100*prop_lci) %>% r1, " to ", (100*prop_uci) %>% r1, "]") %>% str_replace("\\[ ", "\\[")
}

make_prop_pe_ci_pct <- function(prop_pe, prop_lci, prop_uci) {
  paste0( (100*prop_pe) %>% r1,
          "% [95%CI: ", (100*prop_lci) %>% r1, " to ", (100*prop_uci) %>% r1, "%]") %>%
    str_replace("\\[ ", "\\[")
  
}        


#Function to rename columns. Please note that this is a more general function not intended purely for this analysis and therefore contains other variables irrelevant to it.
nhanes_rename <- function(x) { x %>% rename(any_of(c(
  #Survey cycle and demographics
  "survey_cycle" = "SDDSRVYR",
  "age" = "RIDAGEYR",
  "sex" = "RIAGENDR",
  "race" = "RIDRETH3",
  #Medical conditions
  "htn" = "BPQ020",
  "dyslipid" = "BPQ080",
  "dm" = "DIQ010",
  "pre_dm" = "DIQ160",
  "chd" = "MCQ160C",
  "angina" = "MCQ160D",
  "mi" = "MCQ160E",
  "stroke" = "MCQ160F",
  "smoke_100" = "SMQ020",
  "smoke_now" = "SMQ040",
  "cancer" = "MCQ220",
  "dialysis" = "KIQ025",
  "failing_kidney" = "KIQ022",
  "hf" = "MCQ160B",
  #Medical recommendations
  "salt_adv_take" = "MCQ371C",
  "chol_meds_adv" = "BPQ090D",
  "chol_meds_take" = "BPQ100D",
  "htn_meds_adv" = "BPQ040A",
  "htn_meds_take" = "BPQ050A",
  "aspirin_adv" = "RXQ510",
  "aspirin_adv_take" = "RXQ515",
  "aspirin_indep" = "RXQ520",
  #Exam data
  "sbp_1" = "BPXOSY1",
  "sbp_2" = "BPXOSY2",
  "sbp_3" = "BPXOSY3",
  "sbp_1" = "BPXSY1",
  "sbp_2" = "BPXSY2",
  "sbp_3" = "BPXSY3",
  "dbp_1" = "BPXODI1",
  "dbp_2" = "BPXODI2",
  "dbp_3" = "BPXODI3",
  "dbp_1" = "BPXDI1",
  "dbp_2" = "BPXDI2",
  "dbp_3" = "BPXDI3",
  "bmi" = "BMXBMI",
  "waist" = "BMXWAIST",
  #Lab values
  "fasting_glucose" = "LBXGLU",
  "hba1c" = "LBXGH",
  "apo_b" = "LBXAPB",
  "ldl" = "LBDLDL",
  "ldl_mh" = "LBDLDLM",
  "ldl_nih" = "LBDLDLN",
  "tg" = "LBXTR",
  "hdl" = "LBDHDD",
  "tc" = "LBXTC",
  "creatinine" = "LBXSCR",
  "urine_creatinine" = "URXUCR",
  "urine_albumin" = "URXUMS",
  "platelets" = "LBXPLTSI",
  "hiv_combo_1516" = "LBXHIVC",
  "hiv_confirm_1516"= "LBXHNAT",
  "hiv_1114" = "LBDHI"
  
)))
}


#Import an nhanes file given an NHANES folder and file
import_nhanes <- function(nhanes_pair) {
          
          #State directory of files
          files <- dir(paste0(nhanes_dir, nhanes_pair[1])) %>%
            #select relevant data
            str_subset("(_I|_H|_G)\\.|P_")
          
          
          #Import files in a given subfolder (lapply is not needed here, but it is made to be more general in case you need more than 1 file a year)
          lapply(files,
                 function(file) {
                    
                    #Read the file
                    data <- read_xpt(file = paste0(nhanes_dir, 
                                                   nhanes_pair[1], "/", 
                                                   file)
                                     )
                    #Rename columns
                    data <- nhanes_rename(data)
                    
                    #If meds, start command to join medications together
                    if(nhanes_pair[2] == "meds") {
                      
                      #Join medications together
                      if("RXDDRUG" %in% colnames(data)) {
                        data <- data %>%
                          group_by(SEQN) %>%
                          summarise(drug_names = paste(RXDDRUG, collapse = "; ")
                                    )
                        
                      } else if("RXD240B" %in% colnames(data)) {
                        
                        data <- data %>%
                          group_by(SEQN) %>%
                          summarise(drug_names = paste(RXD240B, collapse = "; "),
                                    )
                      }
                    }
                    
                    #Return the object
                    data
                   
                 }
                    
          ) %>%
            #Use rbindlist in case you are importing several years at once
            rbindlist(fill = T) -> data
          
          
}

#Convert 1/0 binaries
convert_10 <- function(x) ifelse(x == 1, "yes", "no") %>% factor


#Convert variables coded as 1279 in NHANES to Yes/No
convert_1279 <- function(variable, yes_ind = "Yes", no_ind = "No") {
  fcase(variable == 1, yes_ind,
        variable == 2, no_ind)
}

#Convert variables coded as 123479 in NHANES to Yes/No (this is for aspirin use)
convert_123479 <- function(variable, yes_ind = "Yes", no_ind = "No") {
  fcase(variable %in% c(1, 3), yes_ind,
        variable %in% c(2, 4), no_ind)
}



#Convert race for PCE (White and Black only; everyone is assigned to White if they're not Black)
convert_race_pce <-  function(variable) {
  fcase(variable %in% c(1, 2, 3, 6, 7), "white",
        variable == 4, "black"
        )
}

#Convert race
convert_race_complete <-  function(variable) {
  fcase(variable %in% c(1, 2), "Hispanic",
        variable == 3, "Non-Hispanic White",
        variable == 4, "Non-Hispanic Black",
        variable == 6, "Non-Hispanic Asian",
        variable == 7, "Other (including multiracial)"
        )
}

#Function to indicate if drug was taken
find_drug <- function(drugs_column, drug_string, yes_ind = "Yes", no_ind = "No") {
  fifelse(str_detect(drugs_column, drug_string), yes_ind, no_ind)
}

#Function to indicate if indication is present
find_ind <- function(inds_column, ind_string, yes_ind = "Yes", no_ind = "No") {
  fifelse(str_detect(inds_column, ind_string), yes_ind, no_ind)
}


#Create a function to get survey means and CIs
svymean_df <- function(design, variables) {
  
  #Get chosen variables in the form of "or"
  variables[2] %>%
    #Convert to character
    paste0 %>%
    #Replace + with or
    str_replace_all("\\+", "\\|") %>%
    #Squish together
    str_replace_all(" \\| ", "\\|") -> chosen_vars
  
  #Get the part of svymean's name that corresponds to the variable name
  svymean(design = design, variables, na.rm = T) %>%
    names %>%
    str_extract(chosen_vars) -> chosen_vars
  
  
  #Produce data.table containing the information on totals
  data.table(
    #Variable
    var = chosen_vars,
    #Variable level
    #Total
    pe = svymean(design = design, variables, na.rm = T) %>%
      data.frame %>%
      {.$mean},
    #LCI
    lci = svymean(design = design, variables, na.rm = T) %>% confint %>% data.frame %>% {.$X2.5..},
    #UCI
    uci = svymean(design = design, variables, na.rm = T) %>% confint %>% data.frame %>% {.$X97.5..}
  ) -> mean_df
  
  
  #Add PE/CI col
  mean_df[, pe_ci := make_pe_ci(pe, lci, uci)]
  
  #Return
  print(mean_df)
  
}

 # design = subset(sdata, llt == "no" & old_1 == "no" & age < 40)
 # variables = ~ old_2b
# design = subset(sdata, eval(four_group_filters[[3]]) & llt == "yes" & race == "Non-Hispanic Black"); variables = ~ ldl_cat
# design = subset(sdata,llt == "yes" & race == "Non-Hispanic White"); variables = ~ ldl_cat
#Create a function to neatly get survey totals/proportions and confidence intervals
svytotal_df <- function(design, variables) {
  
  
  
  #Get chosen variables in the form of "or"
  variables[2] %>%
    #Convert to character
    paste0 %>%
    #Replace + with or
    str_replace_all("\\+", "\\|") %>%
    #Squish together
    str_replace_all(" \\| ", "\\|") -> chosen_vars
  
  if(nrow(design$variables) == 0) df <- data.table(
  value = "yes",
  pe = 0,
  lci = 0,
  uci = 0,
  prop_pe = 0,
  prop_lci = 0,
  prop_uci = 0,
  pe_ci = 0,
  prop_pe_ci = 0,
  prop_pe_ci_pct = 0
) else {
  
  #Get the part of svytotal's name that corresponds to the variable name
  svytotal(design = design, variables, na.rm = T) %>%
    names %>%
    str_extract(chosen_vars) -> chosen_vars
  
  #Get the part of svytotal's name that corresponds to the variable value
  svytotal(design = design, variables, na.rm = T) %>%
    names %>%
    str_remove_all(chosen_vars) -> chosen_vars_levels
  
  #Produce data.table containing the information on totals
  data.table(
    #Variable
    var = chosen_vars,
    #Variable level
    value = chosen_vars_levels,
    #Total
    pe = svytotal(design = design, variables, na.rm = T) %>%
      data.frame %>%
      {.$total},
    #LCI
    lci = svytotal(design = design, variables, na.rm = T) %>% confint %>% data.frame %>% {.$X2.5..},
    #UCI
    uci = svytotal(design = design, variables, na.rm = T) %>% confint %>% data.frame %>% {.$X97.5..}
  ) -> total_df
  
  
  
  lapply(chosen_vars_levels,
         function(level) {
           form <- bquote(~ .(variables[[2]]) == .(level))
           #Get proportion
           svyciprop(design = design, 
          formula = form, na.rm = T
          ) %>% {data.table(
               prop_pe = .[1],
               prop_lci = attr(., "ci") %>% .["2.5%"],
               prop_uci = attr(., "ci") %>% .["97.5%"]
             )}
         }
  ) %>%
    rbindlist -> props_df
  
  #Bind
  df <- cbind(total_df, props_df)
  
  #Make pe/ci columns
  df[, pe_ci := make_pe_ci_mil(pe, lci, uci) %>% str_squish]
  df[, prop_pe_ci :=  make_prop_pe_ci(prop_pe, prop_lci, prop_uci) %>% str_squish]
  df[, prop_pe_ci_pct :=  make_prop_pe_ci_pct(prop_pe, prop_lci, prop_uci) %>% str_squish]

}
  
  
  #Return
  df
  
}

#Function to bootstrap differences in eligibility
boot_diff <- function(survey_object = sdata_rep, call_var) {
withReplicates(
  design = survey_object,
  return.replicates = T,
  theta = call_var
) -> rep_result

  #Collect
  data.table(prop_pe = rep_result$theta[1],
             prop_uci = rep_result$replicates %>% quantile(c(0.975)),
             prop_lci = rep_result$replicates %>% quantile(c(0.025))
             ) -> rep_result_df
  
  #Calculate absolutes
  rep_result_df[, pe := prop_pe * sum(survey_object$variables$weight)]
  rep_result_df[, lci := prop_lci * sum(survey_object$variables$weight)]
  rep_result_df[, uci := prop_uci * sum(survey_object$variables$weight)]
  
  #Return
  print(rep_result_df)
}

#Difference (without bootstrap, using a simplifying normality assumption)
#Test
# survey_object = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no")
# cond1 = expr(new_2a == "yes" & new_1 == "no")
# cond2 = expr(old_2b == "yes" & old_1 == "no")

diff_fn <- function(survey_object, cond1, cond2) {
svymean(design = survey_object,
        ~ 
          I(eval(cond1)) +
          I(eval(cond2)),
        na.rm = T) -> svymean_object

svycontrast(stat = svymean_object,
            list(diff_new_old = 
              c(
                `I(eval(cond1))TRUE` = 1,
                `I(eval(cond2))TRUE` = -1
              )
            )
            ) -> svycontrast_object

data.table(prop_pe = svycontrast_object,
           prop_lci = svycontrast_object %>% confint %>% {.[, 1]},
           prop_uci = svycontrast_object %>% confint %>% {.[, 2]}) -> result_df

#Calculate absolutes
result_df[, pe := prop_pe * sum(survey_object$variables$weight)]
result_df[, lci := prop_lci * sum(survey_object$variables$weight)]
result_df[, uci := prop_uci * sum(survey_object$variables$weight)]

#Return
result_df
}


```

### Aesthetic

```{r}

#Create PE (CI) column
pe_ci <- function(pe = pe, lci = lci, uci = uci, rounding = 2) {
  paste0(
    pe  %>% round(rounding) %>% format(nsmall = rounding), " (", 
    lci %>% round(rounding) %>% format(nsmall = rounding), " to ",
    uci  %>% round(rounding) %>% format(nsmall = rounding),
    ")"
  )
}


#Functions to format p
p <- function(p) {
  ifelse(p < 0.001, "<0.001", ifelse(round(p, 2) == 0.05 | round(p, 2) == 0, round(p, 3) %>% format(nsmall = 3), round(p, 3) %>% format(nsmall = 3))) %>% as.character
}

#Loop over numeric variables, sex, and binary (Yes/no) variables and summarize
sum_var <- function(dataset, variable) {
  #Numeric vars 
  if(variable %in% numeric_variables) {
    dataset[, 
      paste0(median(get(variable), na.rm = T) %>% round(1) %>% format(nsmall = 1),
             " (", 
             iqr(get(variable)), ")"
      )
    ]
  } 
  
  #Sex
  else if(variable %>% str_detect("sex|gender")) {
    paste0(dataset[get(variable) %in% c("female", "Female", "Women", "women"), .N] %>% scales::comma(),
           " (", (100*dataset[get(variable) %in% c("female", "Female", "Women", "women"), .N]/dataset[, .N]) %>% r1, "%)")
  }
  
  #Binary vars
  else if(variable %in% binary_variables) {
    paste0(dataset[get(variable) %in% c("Yes", "yes"), .N] %>% scales::comma(),
           " (", (100*dataset[get(variable) %in% c("Yes", "yes"), .N]/dataset[, .N]) %>% r1, "%)")
  }
}


#Get IQRs
iqr <- function(x, rounding = 1) {
  paste0(
    quantile(x, 0.25, na.rm = T) %>% round(rounding) %>% format(nsmall = rounding),
    " to ",
    quantile(x, 0.75, na.rm = T) %>% round(rounding) %>% format(nsmall = rounding)
  )
  
}

#Round to 1 decimal and include zero if needed
r1 <- function(x) {
  x %>% round(1) %>% format(nsmall = 1)
}

#Round to 2 decimals and include zero if needed
r2 <- function(x) {
  x %>% round(2) %>% format(nsmall = 2)
}

#Convert to million
tomil <- function(x) {
  format(round(x / 1e6, 1), nsmall = 1, trim = T)
}

#Perform some aesthetic modifications for flextables
flextable_aes <- function(table, table_title) {
  
  #Table font
  table <- flextable::font(table, fontname = "Times New Roman", part = "all")
  
  #Align everything centrally
  table <- flextable::align(table, align = "center", part = "all")
  
  #Table heading
  table <- flextable::set_caption(table, caption = table_title)
  
  #Align footer to the left
  table <- flextable::align(table, align = "left", part = "footer")
  
  
  #Set Table width
  table <- flextable::width(table, width = 1.5, unit = "in")
  
  #Bold
  table <- flextable::bold(table, part = "header")
  
  #Borders
  table <- table %>% border_inner %>% border_outer
  
  #Print
  table
}


```

## Import

```{r}

#The lefthand side is the name of the folder in which the respective NHANES data files should be deposited. The lefthand side is the name that will be used for the data.frame in R
folders_dfs <- list(
  c("Demographics", "demo"),
  c("LDL_TG_Measure", "ldl_tg_measure"),
  c("TC_measure", "tc_measure"),
  c("HDL_Measure", "hdl_measure"),
  c("Glycohemoglobin", "hba1c"),
  c("Fasting_Glucose", "fasting_glucose"),
  c("BMI", "bmi"),
  c("BP_Measure", "bp_measure"),
  c("BP_Chol", "bp_chol"),
  c("Diabetes", "dm_df"),
  c("Smoke", "smoke_df"),
  c("Urine albumin and creatinine", "urine_alb_cr"),
  c("Medical Conditions", "med_conds"),
  c("Biochem Profile", "biochem"),
  c("Meds", "meds"),
  c("Kidney", "kidney"),
  c("ApoB", "apo_b"),
  c("HIV", "hiv")
)

#Get NHANES directory (INSERT YOUR OWN DIRECTORY HERE)
nhanes_dir <- "C:/Ahmed's Stuff/ResearchStuff/NHANES_Data/"

#Lapply to import NHANES data for a given set of variables
lapply(folders_dfs, function(folder) import_nhanes(folder)) -> data

#Use Reduce to successively merge elements of the data list
Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, all = T, by = "SEQN"), data) -> data

##TABLE 1 FUNCTION
table1_create <- function(dataset, variables, table1_title, 
                          strata_var = NULL, 
                          p_values = FALSE,
                          p_values_col_ind = 5,
                          table_width = 3,
                          numeric_variables, binary_variables
) {
  
  #Store variable names
  var_names <- names(variables)
  
  
  #Get overall CCs using the sum_var function
  lapply(var_names, function(variable) sum_var(dataset, variable)) -> overall_values
  
  #Create strata CCs using the same but with an additional layer of looping for strata levels
  if(!is.null(strata_var)) {
    
    #Strata levels  
    strata_levels <- dataset[, get(strata_var) %>% factor %>% levels]
    
    #Apply over levels of strata of interest
    lapply(1:length(strata_levels),
           function(i)
           {
             stratum <- strata_levels[[i]]
             #CCs of level 1
             lapply(var_names, function(variable) sum_var(dataset = dataset[get(strata_var) == stratum], variable)) %>%
               unlist
           }
    ) -> strata_values
    
    
  }
  
  
  #Create data.table containing the relevant variables
  data.table(
    variable_names = variables %>% unlist,
    variable_values = overall_values %>% unlist
  ) -> table1_df
  
  #Create new columns with the corresponding values for each strata
  if(!is.null(strata_var)) {
    for(i in 1:length(strata_values)) {
      table1_df[, paste0("level_", i) := strata_values[[i]]]
      setnames(table1_df, old = paste0("level_", i), new = strata_levels[i])
    }
  }
  
  #Get p-values if necessary
  if(p_values) {
    #Loop over variables to get test statistics
    lapply(var_names, 
           function(var_name) test_var(dataset, variable = var_name, strata_var)) %>% unlist -> pvals
    table1_df[, p_values := pvals]
  }
  
  #Rename and create a flextable
  table1_df %>%
    rename(any_of(c(
      "Variables" = "variable_names",
      "Overall" = "variable_values",
      "P-values*" = "p_values"
    ))) %>%
    flextable %>% 
    flextable_aes(table1_title) %>%
    bold(j = 1) %>%
    width(width = table_width) -> table_flex
  
  #Add P-value if relevant
  if(p_values) {
    table_flex <- footnote(table_flex, 
             ref_symbols = footnote_symbol(1), 
             j = p_values_col_ind,
             value = as_paragraph("P-values were obtained from Wilcoxon test for continuous variables or from a Chi-square test for categorical variables."))
  }
  
  #Produce table
  table_flex
}
```

## Modify LDL to MH

```{r}
#Create empty x column
data[, mh_factor := NA]


#Non-HDL
data[, non_hdl := tc - hdl]

#Convert stata code to R (to create the script necessary to create the Martin Hopkins factor)
mh_factor_script <- readLines("statacode.do") %>%
  str_replace("if", "data$mh_factor[") %>% #Replace if
  {.[. != ""]} %>% #Remove empty lines
  {.[c(-1, -length(.) )]} %>% #Remove first and last line
  paste0("]") %>% #Put bracket at end of each line
  str_replace_all("nonhdl", "data$non_hdl") %>% #Replace nonhdl by appropriate symbol
  str_replace_all("tg", "data$tg") %>% #Replace tg by appropriate symbol
  str_remove_all("replace|factor=") %>% #Remove replace and factor= 
  paste("<-", word(., 2))  %>% #Relocate conversion factor where appropriate
  str_remove(word(., 2)) %>% #Remove the number at the beginning
  str_trim %>% #Remove unnecessary space at beginning
  str_replace("\\[ ", "\\[") #Remove unnecccessary space after "["

#Run script (which is now written in a format usable in R)
eval(parse(text = mh_factor_script))

#Get MH estimate
data[, ldl := tc - (hdl + (tg/mh_factor))]
data[ldl < 0, ldl := NA]

```

## Clean & Prep

```{r}

#Convert variables coded as 1, 2, 7, or 9
columns_1279 <- c("pre_dm", "dm", "htn", "smoke_100",
                  "chd", "mi", "stroke", "angina", 
                  "cancer", "htn_meds_adv", "htn_meds_take",
                  "failing_kidney", "dialysis", "hf", "hiv_combo_1516", "hiv_confirm_1516",  "hiv_1114"
                  )
data[, (columns_1279) := lapply(.SD, convert_1279, "yes", "no"), 
     .SDcols = columns_1279]
data[failing_kidney == "no", dialysis := "no"]
#Convert hypertension meds to no if appropriate 
data[, htn_meds_take := fifelse(htn == "no" | htn_meds_adv == "no", "no", htn_meds_take)]



#Convert sex
data[, sex := fcase(
    sex == 1, "male",
    sex == 2, "female"
)]

#Convert hiv
data[, hiv := fcase(
  (hiv_combo_1516 == "yes" & is.na(hiv_confirm_1516)) | hiv_confirm_1516 == "yes" | hiv_1114 == "yes", "yes",
  hiv_1114 == "no" | hiv_confirm_1516 == "no" | (hiv_combo_1516 == "yes" & hiv_confirm_1516 == "no"), "no"
)]

#Build a string for statins
statin_string <- c("(?i)LOVASTATIN|PRAVASTATIN|FLUVASTATIN|ROSUVASTATIN|PITAVASTATIN|ATORVASTATIN|SIMVASTATIN|CERIVASTATIN")
pcks9_string <- c("(?i)EVOLOCUMAB|ALIROCUMAB")
eze_string <- c("(?i)EZETIMIBE")

#Indicate drug use
data[, statin := find_drug(drug_names, statin_string, "yes", "no")]
data[, pcsk9 := find_drug(drug_names, pcks9_string, "yes", "no")]
data[, ezetimibe := find_drug(drug_names, eze_string, "yes", "no")]
data[, llt := fifelse(statin == "yes" | pcsk9 == "yes" | ezetimibe == "yes", "yes", "no")]



#Convert race
data[, race_pce := convert_race_pce(race)]
data[, race := convert_race_complete(race)]
data[, black := fifelse(race == "Non-Hispanic Black", "yes", "no")]
data[, hispanic := fifelse(race == "Hispanic", "yes", "no")]
data[, white := fifelse(race == "Non-Hispanic White", "yes", "no")]
data[, asian := fifelse(race == "Non-Hispanic Asian", "yes", "no")]
data[, other := fifelse(race == "Other (including multiracial)", "yes", "no")]

#Convert current smoking habits
data[, smoke_now := fcase(
  smoke_now == 1, "yes",
  smoke_now == 2, "yes",
  smoke_now == 3, "no",
  smoke_100 == "no", "no"
)]

#Create obesity
data[, obesity := fifelse(bmi >= 30, "yes", "no")]

#Calcualte avg systolic and diastolic BP
#Create BP variables that take the mean of any number of measurements
library(kit)
data[, sbp := pmean(sbp_1, sbp_2, sbp_3, na.rm = T)]
data[, dbp := pmean(dbp_1, dbp_2, dbp_3, na.rm = T)]


#Define DM drug use use
insulin_string <- c("INSULIN|LISPRO|ASPART|GLULISINE|NPH|GLARGINE|DETEMIR|DEGLUDEC")
ddp4_string <- c("SITAGLIPTIN|LINAGLIPTIN|ALOGLIPTIN|SAXAGLIPTIN")
tzds_string <- c("REPAGLINIDE|NATEGLINIDE")
sulfonylureas_string <- c("GLIPIZIDE|GLIMEPIRIDE|GLYBURIDE|GLICLAZIDE|TOLBUTAMIDE|CARBUTAMIDE|TOLAZAMIDE|CHLORPROPAMIDE")
meglitinides_string <- c("PIOGLITAZONE|ROSIGLITAZONE")
insulin_string <- c("INSULIN|LISPRO|ASPART|GLULISINE|NPH|GLARGINE|DETEMIR|DEGLUDEC")
amylin_string <- c("PRAMLINTIDE")

data[, insulin := find_drug(drug_names, insulin_string, "Yes", "No")]
data[, ddp4 := find_drug(drug_names, ddp4_string, "Yes", "No")]
data[, tzds := find_drug(drug_names, tzds_string, "Yes", "No")]
data[, sulfonylureas := find_drug(drug_names, sulfonylureas_string, "Yes", "No")]
data[, meglitinides := find_drug(drug_names, meglitinides_string, "Yes", "No")]
data[, insulin := find_drug(drug_names, insulin_string, "Yes", "No")]
data[, amylin := find_drug(drug_names, amylin_string, "Yes", "No")]
data[, dm_drug := fifelse(str_detect(paste0(insulin, ddp4, tzds, sulfonylureas, meglitinides, insulin, amylin), "Yes"), "Yes", "No")]


#Define DM
data[, dm := fcase(
  hba1c >= 6.5 | fasting_glucose >= 126 | dm == "yes" | dm_drug == "Yes", "yes",
  dm == "no" | hba1c < 6.5 | fasting_glucose < 126, "no"
  )]

#Calculate sex-specific constants for eGFR estimation
data[, alpha := fifelse(sex == "male", -0.302, -0.241)]
data[, k := fifelse(sex == "male", 0.9, 0.7)]
data[, constant := fifelse(sex == "male", 1, 1.012)]

#Calculate eGFR
data[, egfr :=
    142 *
    (pmin(creatinine/k, 1)^alpha) *
    (pmax(creatinine/k, 1)^-1.2) *
    (0.9938^age) *
    constant
    ]

#Create age cats for inverse probability matching
data[, age_cats := cut(age, seq(0, 90, 10), include.lowest = T)]

#Create albumin/creatinine ratio
data[, uacr := urine_albumin/(10*urine_creatinine/1000)]

#Estimate pre-treatment LDL/non-HDL
data[, ldl_multiplier := 1]
data[, non_hdl_multiplier := 1]
##For statins
#LDL (Per Marcusa 2020, Assuming a 45.2% reduction)
data[statin == "yes", ldl_multiplier := ldl_multiplier / (1-0.452)]
#Non-HDL (Per Mora 2012, assuming a 40.3% reduction)
data[statin == "yes", non_hdl_multiplier := non_hdl_multiplier / (1-0.403)]

##For PCSK9
#LDL (Per Marcusa 2020, Assuming a 62.3% reduction)
data[pcsk9 == "yes", ldl_multiplier := ldl_multiplier / (1-0.623)]
#Non-HDL (Per Supplementary Figure S3 in the FOURIER trial, assuming a 51.6% reduction)
data[pcsk9 == "yes", non_hdl_multiplier := non_hdl_multiplier / (1-0.516)]

##For Ezetimibe
#LDL (Per Marcusa 2020, Assuming a 25.8% reduction)
data[ezetimibe == "yes", ldl_multiplier := ldl_multiplier / (1-0.258)]
#Non-HDL (per Table S1 in the IMPROVE-IT trial, assuming a 19.9% reduction)
data[ezetimibe == "yes", non_hdl_multiplier := non_hdl_multiplier / (1-0.199)]


#Estimate pre-treatment cholesterol
data[, pre_ttt_ldl := ldl * ldl_multiplier]
data[, pre_ttt_non_ldl := non_hdl * non_hdl_multiplier]

```

## Calculate risk

```{r}

#Create capped versions of variables
data[, tc_cap := fcase(
  tc < 130, 130,
  tc > 320, 320,
  rep(TRUE, .N), tc
)]
data[, sbp_cap := fcase(
  sbp < 90, 90,
  sbp > 200, 200,
  rep(TRUE, .N), sbp
)]

data[, hdl_cap_prevent := fcase(
  hdl < 20, 20,
  hdl > 100, 100,
  rep(TRUE, .N), hdl
)]

data[, bmi_cap_prevent := fcase(
  bmi < 18.5, 18.5,
  bmi > 40, 40,
  rep(TRUE, .N), bmi
)]

data[, egfr_cap_prevent := fcase(
  egfr < 15, 15,
  egfr > 140, 140,
  rep(TRUE, .N), egfr
)]

data[, eligible := fifelse(
  age >= 30 & age <= 79, 1, 0
)]
#Calculate 10-year risk using PREVENT
data[eligible == 1, prevent_10yr := predict_10yr_ascvd_risk(
  age_years = age,
  sex = sex,
  bp_sys_mmhg = sbp_cap,
  bmi = bmi_cap_prevent,
  diabetes = dm,
  bp_meds = htn_meds_take,
  chol_total_mgdl = tc_cap,
  chol_hdl_mgdl = hdl_cap_prevent,
  statin_meds = statin,
  smoke_current = smoke_now,
  egfr = egfr_cap_prevent,
  equation = "Khan_2023"
)]

#Calculate 10-year risk using PREVENT
data[eligible == 1, prevent_30yr := predict_30yr_ascvd_risk(
  age_years = age,
  sex = sex,
  bp_sys_mmhg = sbp_cap,
  bmi = bmi_cap_prevent,
  diabetes = dm,
  bp_meds = htn_meds_take,
  chol_total_mgdl = tc_cap,
  chol_hdl_mgdl = hdl_cap_prevent,
  statin_meds = statin,
  smoke_current = smoke_now,
  egfr = egfr_cap_prevent,
  equation = "Khan_2023"
)]


data[, statin_num := fifelse(statin == "yes", 1, 0)]
data[, dm_num := fifelse(dm == "yes", 1, 0)]
data[, smoke_num := fifelse(smoke_now == "yes", 1, 0)]
data[, htn_meds_num := fifelse(htn_meds_take == "yes", 1, 0)]


#Calculate 10-year risk using more expansive PREVENT
# data[eligible == 1, prevent_10yr_more := predict_10yr_ascvd_risk(
#   age_years = age,
#   sex = sex,
#   bp_sys_mmhg = sbp_cap,
#   bmi = bmi_cap_prevent,
#   diabetes = dm,
#   hba1c = hba1c,
#   acr = uacr,
#   bp_meds = htn_meds_take,
#   chol_total_mgdl = tc_cap,
#   chol_hdl_mgdl = hdl_cap_prevent,
#   statin_meds = statin,
#   smoke_current = smoke_now,
#   egfr = egfr_cap_prevent,
#   sdi = NULL,
#   equation = "Khan_2023",
#   prevent_type = "base"
# )]

#Calculate 10-year risk using PCE
data[age >= 40 & age <= 75, pce_10yr := predict_10yr_ascvd_risk(
  age_years = age,
  race = race_pce,
  sex = sex,
  bp_sys_mmhg = sbp_cap,
  diabetes = dm,
  bp_meds = htn_meds_take,
  chol_total_mgdl = tc_cap,
  chol_hdl_mgdl = hdl_cap_prevent,
  smoke_current = smoke_now,
  equation = "Goff_2013"
)]

data[, sdi := NA]

#Calculate 10-year risk using the full PREVENT equation
data[age >= 30, prevent_10yr_uacr := predict_10yr_ascvd_risk(
  age_years = age,
  sex = sex,
  bp_sys_mmhg = sbp_cap,
  bmi = bmi_cap_prevent,
  diabetes = dm,
  bp_meds = htn_meds_take,
  chol_total_mgdl = tc_cap,
  chol_hdl_mgdl = hdl_cap_prevent,
  statin_meds = statin,
  smoke_current = smoke_now,
  egfr = egfr_cap_prevent,
  hba1c = hba1c,
  acr = uacr,
  sdi = sdi,
  equation = "Khan_2023",
  prevent_type = "acr"
)]

data[age >= 30, prevent_10yr_a1c := predict_10yr_ascvd_risk(
  age_years = age,
  sex = sex,
  bp_sys_mmhg = sbp_cap,
  bmi = bmi_cap_prevent,
  diabetes = dm,
  bp_meds = htn_meds_take,
  chol_total_mgdl = tc_cap,
  chol_hdl_mgdl = hdl_cap_prevent,
  statin_meds = statin,
  smoke_current = smoke_now,
  egfr = egfr_cap_prevent,
  hba1c = hba1c,
  acr = uacr,
  sdi = sdi,
  equation = "Khan_2023",
  prevent_type = "hba1c"
)]

#Calculate 10-year risk using the full PREVENT equation
data[age >= 30, prevent_10yr_uacr_a1c := predict_10yr_ascvd_risk(
  age_years = age,
  sex = sex,
  bp_sys_mmhg = sbp_cap,
  bmi = bmi_cap_prevent,
  diabetes = dm,
  bp_meds = htn_meds_take,
  chol_total_mgdl = tc_cap,
  chol_hdl_mgdl = hdl_cap_prevent,
  statin_meds = statin,
  smoke_current = smoke_now,
  egfr = egfr_cap_prevent,
  hba1c = hba1c,
  acr = uacr,
  sdi = sdi,
  equation = "Khan_2023",
  prevent_type = "full"
)]

#Define CVD
data[, ascvd := fifelse(mi == "yes" | stroke == "yes" | chd == "yes" | angina == "yes", 1, 0) %>% convert_10]
#Define CKD
data[, ckd := fifelse(uacr >= 30 | egfr <= 60, 1, 0) %>% convert_10]

#MetS (per Table 1 in https://www.ahajournals.org/doi/10.1161/cir.0000000000001184)
data[, met_syndrome := fifelse(
  rowSums(cbind(
    tg >= 150,
    sbp >= 130 | dbp >= 80 | htn_meds_take == "yes",
    hdl < 40 & sex == "male",
    hdl < 50 & sex == "female",
    waist > 102 & sex == "male",
    waist > 88 & sex == "female",
    fasting_glucose >= 100
  ), na.rm = TRUE) >= 3,
  1,
  0
)]

#2018 Risk factors (per Table 6 in the 2018 guidelines)
data[, rf_enhancers_2018 := fifelse(rowSums(cbind(ldl %between% c(160, 189.999),
                            non_hdl %between% c(190, 219),
                          egfr %between% c(15, 59),
                               apo_b >= 130,
                            met_syndrome == 1, na.rm = T)) >= 1,
                          1, 0
                          )]

#CKM definition (per Table 1 in https://www.ahajournals.org/doi/10.1161/cir.0000000000001184)
data[, ckm := fifelse(rowSums(cbind(ckd == 1 | met_syndrome == 1 | sbp >= 130 | dbp >= 80 | dm == "yes" | tg >= 135, na.rm = T)) >= 1, 1, 0)]

#RFs in 2026 (per Table 13 in 2026 guidelines)
data[, rf_enhancers_2026 := fifelse(rowSums(cbind(ldl %between% c(160, 189.999), 
                                            (non_hdl %between% c(190, 219)),
                                               apo_b >= 120,
                                               tg >= 150,
                                            ckd == "yes",
                                            tg >= 135,
                                            ckm == 1 ),
                                            na.rm = T) >= 1,
                                    1, 0)]
#Minus LDL/non-HDL criteria for those with LDL>190
data[, rf_enhancers_2026_minus_lipids := fifelse(rowSums(cbind(
                                               apo_b >= 120,
                                               tg >= 150,
                                            ckd == "yes",
                                            tg >= 135,
                                            ckm == 1 ),
                                            na.rm = T) >= 1,
                                    1, 0)]

#Minus LDL/non-HDL criteria for DM
data[, rf_enhancers_2026_minus_ckm := fifelse(rowSums(cbind(ldl %between% c(160, 189.999), 
                                            (non_hdl %between% c(190, 219)),
                                               apo_b >= 120,
                                               tg >= 150,
                                            ckd == "yes",
                                            tg >= 135),
                                            na.rm = T) >= 1,
                                    1, 0)]

#N Lacking 10-year risk estimates
lacking_risk_n <- data[(is.na(pce_10yr) | is.na(prevent_10yr)), .N]

```

## Assign CoR

```{r}


##1 by BOTH guidelines
# LDL >190
data[, v_high_ldl_eligible_2026 := fifelse(pre_ttt_ldl >= 190, 1, 0)]
data[, v_high_ldl_eligible_2018 := fifelse(pre_ttt_ldl >= 190 & age %between% c(20, 75), 1, 0)]

#DM with age 40-75
data[, dm_eligible := fifelse(dm == "yes" & age %between% c(40, 75), 1, 0)]
#ASCVD
data[, ascvd_eligible := fifelse(ascvd == "yes", 1, 0)]


###By 2026 ONLY
##1
##PREVENT-based 
#Base
data[, prevent_high_intermediate_eligible := fifelse(prevent_10yr %between% c(0.05, 0.1), 1, 0)]
data[, prevent_high_eligible := fifelse(prevent_10yr >= 0.1, 1, 0)]
#UACR
data[, prevent_uacr_high_intermediate_eligible := fifelse(prevent_10yr_uacr %between% c(0.05, 0.1), 1, 0)]
data[, prevent_uacr_high_eligible := fifelse(prevent_10yr_uacr >= 0.1, 1, 0)]
#A1c
data[, prevent_a1c_high_intermediate_eligible := fifelse(prevent_10yr_a1c %between% c(0.05, 0.1), 1, 0)]
data[, prevent_a1c_high_eligible := fifelse(prevent_10yr_a1c >= 0.1, 1, 0)]
#UACR and A1c
data[, prevent_uacr_a1c_high_intermediate_eligible := fifelse(prevent_10yr_uacr_a1c %between% c(0.05, 0.1), 1, 0)]
data[, prevent_uacr_a1c_high_eligible := fifelse(prevent_10yr_uacr_a1c >= 0.1, 1, 0)]


#CKD stage III (without dialysis)
data[, ckd_eligible := fifelse(egfr < 60 & dialysis == "no" & ldl %between% c(70, 189), 1, 0)]

##2A
data[, prevent_low_intermediate_eligible := fifelse(prevent_10yr %between% c(0.03, 0.0499999), 1, 0)]
data[age < 30 | age == 80, prevent_low_intermediate_eligible := 0] #0 if outside PREVENT-usable age-range

data[, prevent_low_eligible := fifelse(prevent_10yr <= 0.3 &
                                         (ldl %between% c(160, 189) | prevent_30yr >= 0.1),
                                       1, 0)]
data[!age %between% c(30, 59), prevent_low_eligible := 0] #0 if outside eligible age range
data[, new_2a_ldl30 := prevent_low_eligible %>% convert_10]
#data[, new_2a := pmax(prevent_low_eligible, prevent_low_intermediate_eligible, na.rm = T) %>% convert_10]
data[, new_2a := fifelse(prevent_low_intermediate_eligible == 1 | new_2a_ldl30 == "yes", 1, 0) %>% convert_10]


###2018 ONLY
##2B
data[, pce_intermediate_eligible := fifelse(pce_10yr %between% c(0.05, 0.07499999), 1, 0)]
data[age < 40 | age > 75, pce_intermediate_eligible := 0]
##1
data[, pce_high_eligible := fifelse(pce_10yr > 0.075, 1, 0)]


#Recs by class
data[, new_1 := pmax(v_high_ldl_eligible_2026,
                      dm_eligible,
                      ascvd_eligible,
                      ckd_eligible,
                      prevent_high_eligible,
                      prevent_high_intermediate_eligible,
                      na.rm = T) %>% convert_10]
data[, new_2a_not_1 := fifelse(new_2a == "yes" & new_1 == "no", "yes", "no") %>% factor]


data[, new_12a := pmax(v_high_ldl_eligible_2026,
                      dm_eligible,
                      ascvd_eligible,
                      ckd_eligible,
                      prevent_high_eligible,
                      prevent_high_intermediate_eligible,
                      prevent_low_intermediate_eligible,
                      prevent_low_eligible,
                      na.rm = T) %>% convert_10]

data[, new_1_uacr := pmax(v_high_ldl_eligible_2026,
                      dm_eligible,
                      ascvd_eligible,
                      ckd_eligible,
                      prevent_uacr_high_eligible,
                      prevent_uacr_high_intermediate_eligible,
                      na.rm = T) %>% convert_10]

data[, new_1_a1c := pmax(v_high_ldl_eligible_2026,
                      dm_eligible,
                      ascvd_eligible,
                      ckd_eligible,
                      prevent_a1c_high_eligible,
                      prevent_a1c_high_intermediate_eligible,
                      na.rm = T) %>% convert_10]

data[, new_1_uacr_a1c := pmax(v_high_ldl_eligible_2026,
                      dm_eligible,
                      ascvd_eligible,
                      ckd_eligible,
                      prevent_uacr_a1c_high_eligible,
                      prevent_uacr_a1c_high_intermediate_eligible,
                      na.rm = T) %>% convert_10]


data[, new_1_reason := fcase(ascvd_eligible == 1, "ASCVD",
                             v_high_ldl_eligible_2026 == 1, "LDL-C greater than 190 mg/dL",
                             dm_eligible == 1, "Diabetes mellitus (aged 40 to 75 years)",
                             ckd_eligible == 1, "Stage III CKD not on dialysis",
                             prevent_high_eligible == 1 | prevent_high_intermediate_eligible == 1, "PREVENT-based ASCVD 10-year risk of 5% or more")]



#Old
data[, old_1 := pmax(v_high_ldl_eligible_2018,
                      dm_eligible,
                      ascvd_eligible,
                      pce_high_eligible,
                      na.rm = T) %>% convert_10]

data[, old_12b := pmax(v_high_ldl_eligible_2018,
                      dm_eligible,
                      ascvd_eligible,
                      pce_high_eligible,
                      pce_intermediate_eligible,
                      na.rm = T) %>% convert_10]

data[, old_2b := pce_intermediate_eligible %>% convert_10]
data[, old_2b_not_1 := fifelse(old_2b == "yes" & old_1 == "no", "yes", "no") %>% factor]

data[, old_1_reason := fcase(ascvd_eligible == 1, "ASCVD",
                             v_high_ldl_eligible_2018 == 1, "LDL-C greater than 190 mg/dL",
                             dm_eligible == 1, "Diabetes mellitus (aged 40 to 75 years)",
                             pce_high_eligible == 1, "PCE-based ASCVD 10-year risk of 7.5% or more")]


#Discordance
data[, discordant_type := fcase(
  new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no", "Concordant (no class I recommendation to treat)",
  new_1 == "yes" & old_1 == "yes", "Concordant (class I recommendation to treat)",
  old_1 == "no" & new_1 == "yes"  , "Discordant (new class I recommendation to treat)",
    old_1 == "yes" & new_1 == "no"  , "Discordant (no longer has class I recommendation to treat)"
) %>% factor]

data[, discordant_type := fct_relevel(discordant_type,
                                      c("Concordant (no class I recommendation to treat)",
                                        "Concordant (class I recommendation to treat)",
                                        "Discordant (new class I recommendation to treat)",
                                        "Discordant (no longer has class I recommendation to treat)"
                                        )
                                      )]

data[, discordant_2_type := fcase(
  new_2a_not_1 == "no" & old_2b_not_1 == "no", "Concordant (no class II recommendation to treat)",
  new_2a_not_1 == "yes" & old_2b_not_1 == "yes", "Concordant (class II recommendation to treat)",
  old_2b_not_1 == "no" & new_2a_not_1 == "yes"  , "Discordant (new class II recommendation to treat)",
  old_2b_not_1 == "yes" & new_2a_not_1 == "no"  , "Discordant (no longer has class II recommendation to treat)"
) %>% factor]

data[, discordant_12_type := fcase(
  new_12a == "no" & old_12b == "no", "Concordant (no class I/II recommendation to treat)",
  new_12a == "yes" & old_12b == "yes", "Concordant (class I/II recommendation to treat)",
  old_12b == "no" & new_12a == "yes"  , "Discordant (new class I/II recommendation to treat)",
  old_12b == "yes" & new_12a == "no"  , "Discordant (no longer has class I/II recommendation to treat)"
) %>% factor]

data[, discordant_12_type := fct_relevel(discordant_12_type,
                                      c("Concordant (no class I/II recommendation to treat)",
                                        "Concordant (class I/II recommendation to treat)",
                                        "Discordant (new class I/II recommendation to treat)",
                                        "Discordant (no longer has class I/II recommendation to treat)"
                                        )
                                      )]


data[, new_2a_ldl30 := fifelse(
  prevent_10yr < 0.03 & age %between% c(30, 59) &
  (ldl %between% c(160, 189) | (prevent_30yr >= 0.1) ) &
    ascvd == "no" & (dm == "no" | age < 40 | age > 75) & egfr >= 60
    ,
  "yes", "no")]


#Eligible for CACS measurement if uncertainty re: LLT decision
cacs_eligible_exp <- expr(prevent_10yr %between% c(0.03, 0.1) &
                        ((age >= 40 & sex == "male") | (age >= 45 & sex == "female")) &
       llt == "no" & egfr >= 60 & dm == "no" & ldl < 190 & ascvd == "no")
data[, cacs_eligible := fifelse(eval(cacs_eligible_exp), "yes", "no") %>% factor]

```


## Goals

```{r}

#MODIFY TO ADD ZETIA
#Define v high risk ASCVD
data[, vh_risk_ascvd := fifelse(ascvd == "yes" & 
                                  ((mi == "yes" & stroke == "yes") |
                                  age >= 65 | smoke_now == "yes" | dm == "yes" | hf == "yes" | htn == "yes" | 
                                    (ldl > 100 & statin == "yes" & ezetimibe == "yes")),
                                "yes", "no"
                                  )]

#Define goals
data[, goal_100_130 := fifelse(new_1 == "yes" & 
                                 (prevent_10yr < 0.1 |
                                    pre_ttt_ldl >= 190 |
                                    dm == "yes" 
                                    ),
                               1, 0
                                 )]

data[, goal_70_100 := fifelse(new_1 == "yes" & 
                                 (prevent_10yr >= 0.1 |
                                    (pre_ttt_ldl >= 190 & rf_enhancers_2026_minus_lipids == 1) |
                                    (dm == "yes" & rf_enhancers_2026_minus_ckm == 1) |
                                    (ascvd == "yes" & vh_risk_ascvd == "no")
                                 ),
                               1, 0
)]

data[, goal_55_85 := fifelse(new_1 == "yes" & 
                                (( (pre_ttt_ldl >= 190 | tg >= 150 | vh_risk_ascvd == "yes")  & ascvd == "yes")
                                ),
                              1, 0
)]

#Give goal
data[, goal := fcase(
  goal_55_85 == 1, "LDL-C/non-HDL-C targets of <55/<85 mg/dL",
  goal_70_100 == 1, "LDL-C/non-HDL-C targets of <70/<100 mg/dL",
  goal_100_130 == 1, "LDL-C/non-HDL-C targets of <100/<130 mg/dL"
) %>% factor]


#ApoB goals
data[, apo_b_goal := fcase(
  (dm == 1 | prevent_10yr %between% c(0.05, 0.0999)) & goal == "LDL-C/non-HDL-C targets of <100/<130 mg/dL", "ApoB target of <90 mg/dL",
  (dm == 1 | prevent_10yr >= 0.1) & goal == "LDL-C/non-HDL-C targets of <70/<100 mg/dL", "ApoB target of <70 mg/dL",
  vh_risk_ascvd == "yes", "ApoB target of <55 mg/dL"
)]


#LDL cats
data[, ldl_cat := fcase(
  ldl < 55, "LDL-C <55 mg/dL",
  ldl %between% c(55, 69.999999), "LDL-C 55-69 mg/dL",
  ldl %between% c(70, 99.99999999), "LDL-C 70-99 mg/dL",
  ldl >= 100, "LDL-C of 100 mg/dL or greater"
) %>% factor]

#Goal needs based on LDL and non-HDL
data[, goal_need := fcase(
  goal_55_85 == 1 & (ldl >= 55 | non_hdl >= 85), "Requires intensification to meet LDL-C/non-HDL-C targets of <55/<85 mg/dL",
  goal_70_100 == 1 & (ldl >= 70 | non_hdl >= 100), "Requires intensification to meet LDL-C/non-HDL-C targets of <70/<100 mg/dL",
  goal_100_130 == 1 & (ldl >= 100 | non_hdl >= 130), "Requires intensification to meet LDL-C/non-HDL-C targets of <100/<130 mg/dL",
  (goal_55_85 == 1 & (ldl < 55 | non_hdl < 85)) | (goal_70_100 == 1 & (ldl < 70 | non_hdl < 100)) | (goal_100_130 == 1 & (ldl < 100 | non_hdl < 130)),
  "At goal"
  ) %>% factor]


#Goal needs based on LDL only
data[, goal_need_ldl := fcase(
  goal_55_85 == 1 & (ldl >= 55), "Requires intensification to meet LDL-C target of <55 mg/dL",
  goal_70_100 == 1 & (ldl >= 70), "Requires intensification to meet LDL-C target of <70 mg/dL",
  goal_100_130 == 1 & (ldl >= 100), "Requires intensification to meet LDL-C target of <100 mg/dL",
  (goal_55_85 == 1 & (ldl < 55)) | (goal_70_100 == 1 & (ldl < 70)) | (goal_100_130 == 1 & (ldl < 100)),
  "At goal"
  ) %>% factor]

#Goal needs based on non-HDL-only
data[, goal_need_non_hdl := fcase(
  goal_55_85 == 1 & (non_hdl >= 85), "Requires intensification to meet non-HDL-C target of <85 mg/dL",
  goal_70_100 == 1 & (non_hdl >= 100), "Requires intensification to meet non-HDL-C target of <100 mg/dL",
  goal_100_130 == 1 & (non_hdl >= 130), "Requires intensification to meet non-HDL-C target of <130 mg/dL",
  (goal_55_85 == 1 & (non_hdl < 85)) | (goal_70_100 == 1 & (non_hdl < 100)) | (goal_100_130 == 1 & (non_hdl < 130)),
  "At goal"
  ) %>% factor]

#Meets LDL but not non-HDL
data[, goal_need_non_hdl_not_ldl := fcase(
  goal_55_85 == 1 & ldl < 55 & non_hdl >= 85, "Requires intensification to meet non-HDL-C target of <85 mg/dL",
  goal_70_100 == 1 & ldl < 70 & (non_hdl >= 100), "Requires intensification to meet non-HDL-C target of <100 mg/dL",
  goal_100_130 == 1 & ldl < 100 & (non_hdl >= 130), "Requires intensification to meet non-HDL-C target of <130 mg/dL",
  default = "Concordant"
)]

#Meets non-HDL but not LDL-C
data[, goal_need_ldl_not_non_hdl := kit::nif(
  goal_55_85 == 1 & ldl >= 55 & non_hdl < 85, "Requires intensification to meet LDL-C target of <55 mg/dL",
  goal_70_100 == 1 & ldl >= 70 & (non_hdl < 100), "Requires intensification to meet LDL-C target of <70 mg/dL",
  goal_100_130 == 1 & ldl >= 100 & (non_hdl < 130), "Requires intensification to meet LDL-C target of <100 mg/dL",
  default = "Concordant"
)]


#Goal needs according to LDL and non-HDL (3 cats)
data[, goal_need_ldl_non_hdl := fcase(
  goal_need_ldl != "At goal", "Does not meet LDL-C goal",
  goal_need_ldl == "At goal" & goal_need_non_hdl != "At goal", "Meets LDL-C but not non-HDL-C goal",
  goal_need_ldl == "At goal" & goal_need_non_hdl == "At goal", "Meets both LDL-C and non-HDL-C goal"
) %>% factor]

#ApoB goal attainment
data[, goal_need_apo_b := fcase(
  apo_b_goal == "ApoB target of <90 mg/dL" & apo_b >= 90, "Requires intensifcation to meet apoB target of <90 mg/dL",
  apo_b_goal == "ApoB target of <70 mg/dL" & apo_b >= 70, "Requires intensifcation to meet apoB target of <70 mg/dL",
  apo_b_goal == "ApoB target of <55 mg/dL" & apo_b >= 55, "Requires intensifcation to meet apoB target of <55 mg/dL",
  default = "At goal"
  
)]

#Goal needs according to LDL and apoB
data[, goal_need_ldl_apo_b := fcase(
  goal_need_ldl != "At goal", "Does not meet LDL-C goal",
  goal_need_ldl == "At goal" & goal_need_apo_b != "At goal", "Meets LDL-C but not apoB goal",
  goal_need_ldl == "At goal" & goal_need_apo_b == "At goal", "Meets both LDL-C and apoB goal"
) %>% factor]


data[, goal_need_3 := fcase(
  goal_need_ldl != "At goal", "Does not meet LDL-C goal",
  goal_need_ldl == "At goal" & goal_need_non_hdl != "At goal", "Meets LDL-C but not non-HDL-C goal",
  goal_need_ldl == "At goal" & goal_need_non_hdl == "At goal" & goal_need_apo_b != "At goal", "Meets LDL-C and non-HDL-C but not apoB goal",
  goal_need_ldl == "At goal" & goal_need_non_hdl == "At goal" & goal_need_apo_b == "At goal", "Meets LDL-C, non-HDL-C, and apoB goals"
  
  
)]

```

## Impute mean values for eGFR

```{r}
#Create backup copy
data[, egfr_o := copy(egfr)]

#Impute
data[(WTSAF2YR > 0 | WTSAFPRP.x > 0), 
     egfr := wtd.mean(x = egfr_o, w = c(WTSAF2YR, WTSAFPRP.x) %>% na.omit,
                           na.rm = T)]


```

## Create new propensity weights

```{r}
#Adjust survey weights to reflect proportion of data from each cycle (these weights are not yet adjusted for item nonresponse)
data[survey_cycle != 66, pre_adj_weight := WTSAF2YR * 2/data[, 1.2 + uniqueN(survey_cycle)*2]] 
data[survey_cycle == 66, pre_adj_weight := WTSAFPRP.x * 3.2/data[, 1.2 + uniqueN(survey_cycle)*2]] 
# setnames(data, "WTMEC2YR", "pre_adj_weight")
# data[, pre_adj_weight := pre_adj_weight/uniqueN(survey_cycle)]

#Propensity model
glm(data = data[age >= 20 & pre_adj_weight > 0], 
    weight = pre_adj_weight/mean(pre_adj_weight),
    family = "binomial", 
    !is.na(new_1) & (!is.na(new_2a_not_1)) & !is.na(old_1) & (!is.na(old_2b_not_1)) ~ rms::rcs(age, 6) * sex * race) -> mprop

#Invert predicted probability of response
data[age >= 20 & pre_adj_weight > 0, inv_probs := 1/predict(mprop, .SD, type = "response")]


#Create new adjusted weights
data[!is.na(new_1) & (!is.na(new_2a_not_1)) & !is.na(old_1) & (!is.na(old_2b_not_1)), weight := inv_probs * pre_adj_weight]
data[, weight := weight * (data[age >= 20 & pre_adj_weight > 0, 
                                sum(pre_adj_weight)/sum(weight, na.rm = T)])] #Renormalize to equalize to target population

#Check that the resultant weights add up
all.equal(data[age >= 20 & !is.na(new_1) & !is.na(old_1) & !is.na(new_2a_not_1) & !is.na(old_2b_not_1),
               sum(weight, na.rm = T)],
          round(data[age >= 20, sum(pre_adj_weight, na.rm = T)]))
data[is.na(weight), weight := 0]
```

## Create weights for LDL

```{r}
#Weights for ppl with ldl
data[survey_cycle != 66, pre_adj_weight_ldl := WTSAF2YR * 2/data[, 1.2 + uniqueN(survey_cycle)*2]] 
data[survey_cycle == 66, pre_adj_weight_ldl := WTSAFPRP.x * 3.2/data[, 1.2 + uniqueN(survey_cycle)*2]] 

#Propensity model for ppl with ldl
glm(data = data[age >= 20 & pre_adj_weight > 0 & new_1 == "yes" & llt == "yes"], 
    weight = pre_adj_weight/mean(pre_adj_weight),
    family = "binomial", 
    !is.na(goal_need_3) ~ rcs(age, 6) * sex * race) -> mprop_ldl

#Invert predicted probability of response for ppl with ldl
data[age >= 20 & pre_adj_weight_ldl > 0, 
     inv_probs_ldl := 1/predict(mprop_ldl, .SD, type = "response")]

#Create new adjusted weights for ppl with ldl
data[!is.na(goal_need_3) & new_1 == "yes" & llt == "yes", weight_ldl := inv_probs_ldl * pre_adj_weight_ldl]

data[, weight_ldl := weight_ldl * (data[age >= 20 & new_1 == "yes" & llt == "yes",
                                          sum(weight)/sum(data$weight_ldl, na.rm = T)])] #Renormalize to equalize to target population

#Set weights to 0 if applicable
data[is.na(weight_ldl), weight_ldl := 0]


```

## Create weights for Subset of ppl with HIV

```{r}
#Weights for ppl with HIV
data[survey_cycle != 66, pre_adj_weight_hiv := WTSAF2YR * 2/data[survey_cycle != 66, uniqueN(survey_cycle)*2]] 

#Propensity model for ppl with HIV
glm(data = data[age >= 20 & pre_adj_weight_hiv > 0], 
    weight = pre_adj_weight_hiv/mean(pre_adj_weight_hiv),
    family = "binomial", 
    !is.na(new_1) & (!is.na(new_2a_not_1)) & !is.na(old_1) & (!is.na(old_2b_not_1)) ~ rcs(age, 6) * sex * race) -> mprop_hiv

#Invert predicted probability of response for ppl with HIV
data[age >= 20 & pre_adj_weight_hiv > 0, 
     inv_probs_hiv := 1/predict(mprop_hiv, .SD, type = "response")]

#Create new adjusted weights for ppl with HIV
data[!is.na(new_1) & !is.na(old_1), weight_hiv := inv_probs_hiv * pre_adj_weight_hiv]
data[, weight_hiv := weight_hiv * (data[age >= 20,
                                          sum(weight)/sum(data$weight_hiv, na.rm = T)])] #Renormalize to equalize to target population

#Set weights to 0 if applicable
data[is.na(weight_hiv), weight_hiv := 0]



```

## Create weights for treatment goal (apoB; only until 2016)

## Create weights for treatment goal (apoB; only until 2016)

```{r}
#Weights for ppl with apoB
data[survey_cycle != 66, pre_adj_weight_apob := WTSAF2YR * 2/data[survey_cycle != 66, uniqueN(survey_cycle)*2]] 

#Propensity model for ppl with apoB
glm(data = data[age >= 20 & pre_adj_weight_apob > 0 & new_1 == "yes" & llt == "yes"], 
    weight = pre_adj_weight_apob/mean(pre_adj_weight_apob),
    family = "binomial", 
    !is.na(goal_need_3) ~ rcs(age, 6) * sex * race) -> mprop_apob

#Invert predicted probability of response for ppl with apoB
data[age >= 20 & pre_adj_weight_apob > 0, 
     inv_probs_apob := 1/predict(mprop_apob, .SD, type = "response")]

#Create new adjusted weights for ppl with apoB
data[!is.na(goal_need_3) & new_1 == "yes" & llt == "yes", weight_apob := inv_probs_apob * pre_adj_weight_apob]

data[, weight_apob := weight_apob * (data[age >= 20 & new_1 == "yes" & llt == "yes",
                                          sum(weight)/sum(data$weight_apob, na.rm = T)])] #Renormalize to equalize to target population

#Set weights to 0 if applicable
data[is.na(weight_apob), weight_apob := 0]



```


## Convert to a survey object

```{r}


#Make survey object out of x
sdata <- svydesign(data = data,
                ids = data$SDMVPSU,
                strata = data$SDMVSTRA,
                weights = data$weight,
                nest = TRUE)

# bp_exclusion <- expr(is.na(sbp) | is.na(dbp))
# age_exclusion <- expr(age < 20)
# 
# missing_age_n <- data[eval(age_exclusion), .N]
# missing_bp_n <- data[!eval(age_exclusion)][eval(bp_exclusion) & weight > 0, .N]
# missing_rec_exclusion <- data[!eval(age_exclusion)][!eval(bp_exclusion) & weight > 0][(is.na(new_1) | is.na(old_1) | is.na(new_1_mod)) & weight > 0, .N]

#Subset
subset(sdata, 
       subset = 
         #Limit to 20+
         age >= 20  &
         #Exclude if unavailable class I recommendation
       !is.na(new_1) & !is.na(old_1) & (!is.na(new_2a_not_1)) & (!is.na(old_2b_not_1)) & weight > 0
         ) -> sdata


#Make survey object out of x for HIV
sdata_hiv <- svydesign(data = data,
                ids = data$SDMVPSU,
                strata = data$SDMVSTRA,
                weights = data$weight_hiv,
                nest = TRUE)


```

## HIV numbers

```{r}
#Overall
svytotal_df(sdata_hiv %>% subset(age %between% c(40, 75)), variables = ~ hiv) -> hiv_df
#By sex
svytotal_df(sdata_hiv %>% subset(age %between% c(40, 75) & hiv == "yes"), variables = ~ sex) -> hiv_sex_df
#How many were eligible based on old guidelines?
svytotal_df(sdata_hiv %>% subset(age %between% c(40, 75) & hiv == "yes"), variables = ~ old_1) -> hiv_old_df
#Modify the formating of the pe-ci column since they're all <1m
hiv_sex_df[, pe_ci_form := paste0(pe %>% comma, " [95%CI: ", lci %>% comma, " to ", uci %>% comma, "]")]
hiv_df[, pe_ci_form := paste0(pe %>% comma, " [95%CI: ", lci %>% comma, " to ", uci %>% comma, "]")]
hiv_old_df[, pe_ci_form := paste0(pe %>% comma, " [95%CI: ", lci %>% comma, " to ", uci %>% comma, "]")]
rm(sdata_hiv)

```


# Analyze

##Baseline CCs table

```{r}

abbs_line <- "ACC: American College of Cardiology; AHA: American Heart Association; ASCVD: Atherosclerotic Cardiovascular disease; CKD: Chronic kidney disease; NH: Non-Hispanic"
explanation_line <- "Chronic kidney disease was defined by an eGFR <60 mL/min/1.73 m² or a urine albumin-creatinine ratio ≥30mg/g. Obesity was defined by a body mass index ≥25mg/kg². Diabetes was defined by an HbA1c ≥6.5%, fasting glucose ≥126mg/dL, a self-reported history of diabetes, or use of medications specific to diabetes. ASCVD was defined by a self-reported history of myocardial infarction, coronary heart disease, angina, or stroke"


#Wtd-media-iqr function
wtd_median_iqr <- function(var, wt, rounding = 0) {
  paste0(round(wtd.quantile(var, weights = wt, na.rm = T)[3], rounding) %>% format(nsmall = rounding),
         " (", round(wtd.quantile(var, weights = wt, na.rm = T)[2], rounding) %>% format(nsmall = rounding),
         " to ",
         round(wtd.quantile(var, weights = wt, na.rm = T)[4], rounding) %>% format(nsmall = rounding),
         ")")
}

library(Hmisc)
list(c("Number of survey respondents (N)", sdata$variables[, .N %>% comma]),
     c("Number of US adults (N, in millions)", sdata$variables[, sum(weight) %>% tomil]),
     c("Age (years)", sdata$variables[, wtd_median_iqr(age, weight)]),
     c("Proportion of women (%)", sdata$variables[, sum(weight[sex == "female"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("Race/Ethnicity (%)", ""),
     c("   Non-Hispanic White", sdata$variables[, sum(weight[race == "Non-Hispanic White"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   Non-Hispanic Black", sdata$variables[, sum(weight[race == "Non-Hispanic Black"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   Hispanic", sdata$variables[, sum(weight[race == "Hispanic"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   Non-Hispanic Asian", sdata$variables[, sum(weight[race == "Hispanic"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   Other (including multiracial)", sdata$variables[, sum(weight[race == "Other (including multiracial)"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("Body mass index (kg/m2)", sdata$variables[!is.na(bmi), wtd_median_iqr(bmi, weight, 1)]),
     c("Systolic Blood pressure (mmHg)", sdata$variables[!is.na(sbp), wtd_median_iqr(sbp, weight, 0)]),
     c("Diastolic Blood pressure (mmHg)", sdata$variables[!is.na(dbp), wtd_median_iqr(dbp, weight, 0)]),
     c("HbA1c (%)", sdata$variables[!is.na(hba1c), wtd_median_iqr(hba1c, weight, 1)]),
     c("Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol (mg/dL)", sdata$variables[!is.na(ldl), wtd_median_iqr(ldl, weight, 0)]),
     c("Total cholesterol (mg/dL)", sdata$variables[!is.na(tc), wtd_median_iqr(tc, weight, 0)]),
     c("High-density lipoprotein cholesterol (mg/dL)", sdata$variables[!is.na(hdl), wtd_median_iqr(hdl, weight, 0)]),
     c("Non-High-density lipoprotein cholesterol (mg/dL)", sdata$variables[!is.na(hdl) & !is.na(tc), wtd_median_iqr(tc - hdl, weight, 0)]),
     c("Triglycerides (mg/dL)", sdata$variables[!is.na(ldl), wtd_median_iqr(tg, weight, 0)]),
     c("Cardiovascular risk factors (%)", ""),
     c("   Obesity", sdata$variables[!is.na(bmi), sum(weight[bmi >= 30]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   Diabetes", sdata$variables[!is.na(dm), sum(weight[dm == "yes"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   Hypertension", sdata$variables[!is.na(htn), sum(weight[htn == "yes"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   CKD", sdata$variables[!is.na(ckd), sum(weight[ckd == "yes"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   eGFR ≤59 ml/min/1.73m^2^", sdata$variables[!is.na(egfr), sum(weight[egfr <= 59]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   UACR ≥30 mg/g", sdata$variables[!is.na(uacr), sum(weight[uacr >= 30]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   LDL-C ≥190 mg/dL", sdata$variables[!is.na(ckd), sum(weight[ckd == "yes"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)}),
     c("   Smoking", sdata$variables[!is.na(smoke_now), sum(weight[smoke_now == "yes"]/sum(weight))] %>% {r1(.*100)})
) %>%
  {tibble(
    `Variable` = lapply(., "[[", 1) %>% unlist,
    `Value` = lapply(., "[[", 2) %>% unlist
  )} -> baseline_table

flextable(baseline_table) %>%
  border_inner %>%
  border_outer %>%
  merge_h %>%
  bold(i = 1, part = "header") %>%
  bold(j = 1) %>%
  flextable::font(fontname = "Times New Roman") %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("LDL-C: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol; eGFR: Estimated glomerular filtration rate; UACR: Urine albumin-to-creatinine ratio"), colwidths = 2) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("Data for binary variables are displayed as percentages. Data for continuous variables are shown as medians and interquartile ranges."), colwidths = 2) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(explanation_line), colwidths = 2) %>%
  flextable_aes(paste0("Supplementary Table 5. Baseline characteristics of survey respondents (N = ", sdata$variables[, .N] %>% comma, ")")) %>%
  
  width(width = 3.5) -> baseline_table_t
  save_as_docx(baseline_table_t, path = "Tables/Supplementary Table 5.docx")

```

##Missing data characterization

```{r}
#Tabulate missing data %
list(
  c("Age", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(age)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("Sex", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(sex)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("Systolic blood pressure measurement", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(sbp)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("Diastolic blood pressure measurement", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(dbp)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("Body mass index", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(bmi)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("Diabetes", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(dm)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("Smoking", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(smoke_now)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("ASCVD", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(ascvd)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("HbA1c", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(hba1c)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("Total cholesterol", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(tc)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("High-density lipoprotein cholesterol", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(hdl)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("Creatinine**", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(creatinine)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("Urine albumin-creatinine ratio", 
    data[age >= 20, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(uacr)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("PREVENT ASCVD risk*", 
    data[age >= 20 & age %between% c(30, 79) & ascvd == "no" & ckd == "no" & egfr >= 60 & ldl < 190, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(prevent_10yr)]/sum(weight)))]
  ),
  c("PCE risk*", 
    data[age >= 20 & age %between% c(40, 75) & ascvd == "no" & ckd == "no" & ldl < 190, 
         r1(100*sum(weight[is.na(prevent_10yr)]/sum(weight)))]
  )
) %>%
  unlist %>%
  matrix(.,
         ncol = 2,
         byrow = T) %>%
  data.table -> missing_df
setnames(missing_df, new = c("Variable", "Weighted % missing"))

#Save as a word doc
missing_df %>% 
               flextable %>%
               border_inner %>%
               border_outer %>%
               merge_h %>%
               bold(i = 1, part = "header") %>%
               bold(j = 1) %>%
               set_caption(caption = as_paragraph("Supplementary Table 4. Weighted proportions of missing data among respondents.")) %>%
               flextable::font(fontname = "Times New Roman") %>%
               fontsize(size = 11) %>%
               add_footer_row(colwidths = 2, 
                              values = as_paragraph("*Estimated glomerular filtration rate in patients with a missing creatinine was imputed based on the weighted average of the study sample.\n**These proportions exclude participants who were not eligible for risk calculation because they were outside the validated range of either calculator and those with independent class I treatment recommendations.")) %>%
  width(width = c(4, 2.5)) -> missing_data_t
               
save_as_docx(missing_data_t, path = "Tables/Supplementary Table 4.docx")


```

## Function to get totals

```{r}

#Experiment
 # design = subset(sdata, llt == "no" & old_1 == "no")
 # var = ~ old_2b
 # include_ascvd = F
 # n_cats = 2



get_svytotals <- function(design = sdata, var, n_cats = 2, include_ascvd = TRUE) {

  lst <- list(
    #Overall
    " " = svytotal_df(design = design, 
                     variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Overall"),
    
    #Age-stratified
    "Below 40" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age < 40), 
                            variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    "40-64" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(40, 64)), 
                         variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    "65 or older" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age >= 65), 
                               variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    #Sex-stratified
    "Female" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, sex == "female"), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Sex"),
    "Male" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, sex == "male"), 
                        variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Sex"),
    
    #Race-stratified
    "NH Black" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, race == "Non-Hispanic Black"), 
                            variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity"),
    "NH White" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, race == "Non-Hispanic White"), 
                            variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity"),
    "NH Asian" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, race == "Non-Hispanic Asian"), 
                            variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity"),
    "Hispanic" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, race == "Hispanic"), 
                            variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity"),
    
    #Comorbidities
    "CKD" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, ckd == "yes"), 
                       variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Comorbidities"),
    "Obesity" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, obesity == "yes"), 
                           variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Comorbidities"),
    "Diabetes" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, dm == "yes"), 
                            variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Comorbidities"),
    "No CKD" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, ckd == "no"), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Comorbidities"),
    "No Obesity" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, obesity == "no"), 
                              variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Comorbidities"),
    "No Diabetes" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, dm == "no"), 
                               variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Comorbidities")
  )

  # Conditionally add ASCVD
  if (include_ascvd) {
    lst[["ASCVD"]] <- svytotal_df(design = subset(design, ascvd == "yes"), 
                                 variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Comorbidities")
  }

  #Store
  df <- data.table(
    rbindlist(lst) %>% select(-var),
    stratum = names(lst) %>% rep(each = n_cats)
  )
  
  #Print
  df
}



```

##Extract relevant subgroups

```{r}
subsets_calls_list <- list(
  quote(design),
  quote(subset(design, age < 40)),
  quote(subset(design, age %between% c(40, 64))),
  quote(subset(design, age >= 65)),
  quote(subset(design, sex == "female")),
  quote(subset(design, sex == "male")),
  quote(subset(design, race == "Non-Hispanic Black")),
  quote(subset(design, race == "Non-Hispanic White")),
  quote(subset(design, race == "Non-Hispanic Asian")),
  quote(subset(design, race == "Hispanic")),
  quote(subset(design, ckd == "yes")),
  quote(subset(design, ckd == "no")),
  quote(subset(design, obesity == "yes")),
  quote(subset(design, obesity == "no")),
  quote(subset(design, dm == "yes")),
  quote(subset(design, dm == "no")),
  quote(subset(design, ascvd == "yes"))
)


```

## Eligible for initiation

### Get numbers

#### Base (main)

#####1A

```{r}
#Eligibility under either guideline
get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ new_1) -> new_1_df
get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ old_1) -> old_1_df


#Get differences in initiation eligibility
lapply(
  subsets_calls_list,
  function(subset_call) {
    diff_fn(survey_object = eval(subset_call, 
                                 envir = list(design = sdata %>%
            subset(llt == "no"))),
            cond1 = expr(new_1 == "yes"),
            cond2 = expr(old_1 == "yes")
          ) 
  }) -> abs_diff_init_df

abs_diff_init_df <- rbindlist(abs_diff_init_df)
abs_diff_init_df[, stratum := new_1_df$stratum %>% unique]
```

#####1A + 2

```{r}
#Eligibility under either guideline
get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ new_12a) -> new_12a_df
get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ old_12b) -> old_12b_df


#Get differences in initiation eligibility
lapply(
  subsets_calls_list,
  function(subset_call) {
    diff_fn(survey_object = eval(subset_call, 
                                 envir = list(design = sdata %>%
            subset(llt == "no"))),
            cond1 = expr(new_12a == "yes"),
            cond2 = expr(old_12b == "yes")
          ) 
  }) -> abs_diff_init_df_12

abs_diff_init_df_12 <- rbindlist(abs_diff_init_df_12)
abs_diff_init_df_12[, stratum := new_1_df$stratum %>% unique]
```

#####2

```{r}
#Eligibility under either guideline
get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), include_ascvd = F, var = ~ new_2a_not_1) -> new_2a_df
get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), include_ascvd = F, var = ~ old_2b_not_1) -> old_2b_df

    diff_fn(survey_object = eval(subsets_calls_list[[1]], 
     envir = list(design = sdata %>%
                      subset(llt == "no"))),
            cond1 = expr(new_2a == "yes" & new_1 == "no"),
            cond2 = expr(old_2b == "yes" & old_1 == "no")
          ) -> o

#Get differences in initiation eligibility
lapply(
  subsets_calls_list,
  function(subset_call) {
    diff_fn(survey_object = eval(subset_call, 
                                 envir = list(design = sdata %>%
            subset(llt == "no"))),
            cond1 = expr(new_2a_not_1 == "yes"),
            cond2 = expr(old_2b_not_1 == "yes")
          ) 
  }) -> abs_diff_init_df_2

abs_diff_init_df_2 <- rbindlist(abs_diff_init_df_2)
abs_diff_init_df_2 <- abs_diff_init_df_2[-nrow(abs_diff_init_df_2)]
abs_diff_init_df_2[, stratum := new_2a_df$stratum %>% unique]
```


#### A1c and UACR

```{r}
get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ new_1_uacr_a1c) -> new_1_df_uacr_a1c

#Get differences in initiation eligibility
lapply(
  subsets_calls_list,
  function(subset_call) {
    diff_fn(survey_object = eval(subset_call, 
                                 envir = list(design = sdata %>%
            subset(llt == "no"))),
            cond1 = expr(new_1_uacr_a1c == "yes"),
            cond2 = expr(old_1 == "yes")
          ) 
  }) -> abs_diff_init_df_uacr_a1c

#Bind
abs_diff_init_df_uacr_a1c <- rbindlist(abs_diff_init_df_uacr_a1c)
abs_diff_init_df_uacr_a1c[, stratum := new_1_df$stratum %>% unique]
```

#### UACR

```{r}
get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ new_1_uacr) -> new_1_df_uacr

#Get differences in initiation eligibility
lapply(
  subsets_calls_list,
  function(subset_call) {
    diff_fn(survey_object = eval(subset_call, 
                                 envir = list(design = sdata %>%
            subset(llt == "no"))),
            cond1 = expr(new_1_uacr == "yes"),
            cond2 = expr(old_1 == "yes")
          ) 
  }) -> abs_diff_init_df_uacr

#Bind
abs_diff_init_df_uacr <- rbindlist(abs_diff_init_df_uacr)
abs_diff_init_df_uacr[, stratum := new_1_df$stratum %>% unique]

```

#### A1c

```{r}
get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ new_1_a1c) -> new_1_df_a1c



#Get differences in initiation eligibility
lapply(
  subsets_calls_list,
  function(subset_call) {
    diff_fn(survey_object = eval(subset_call, 
                                 envir = list(design = sdata %>%
            subset(llt == "no"))),
            cond1 = expr(new_1_a1c == "yes"),
            cond2 = expr(old_1 == "yes")
          ) 
  }) -> abs_diff_init_df_a1c

#Bind
abs_diff_init_df_a1c <- rbindlist(abs_diff_init_df_a1c)
abs_diff_init_df_a1c[, stratum := new_1_df$stratum %>% unique]


```


####Format and combine

```{r}
#Apply over dfs
lapply(list(old_1_df, 
            new_1_df, new_1_df_a1c, new_1_df_uacr, new_1_df_uacr_a1c,
            new_12a_df, new_2a_df, old_12b_df, old_2b_df,
            abs_diff_init_df, abs_diff_init_df_a1c, abs_diff_init_df_uacr, abs_diff_init_df_uacr_a1c,
            abs_diff_init_df_12, abs_diff_init_df_2),
       function(df)
       {
         df[, pe_ci := make_pe_ci_mil(pe, lci, uci) %>% str_squish]
         df[, prop_pe_ci :=  make_prop_pe_ci(prop_pe, prop_lci, prop_uci) %>% str_squish  %>% str_replace("\\[ ", "\\[")]
         df[, prop_pe_ci_pct :=  make_prop_pe_ci_pct(prop_pe, prop_lci, prop_uci) %>% str_squish %>% str_replace("\\[ ", "\\[")] 
       } 
       )

new_1_title <- "Eligible for treatment by the 2026 ACC/AHA Guideline"
old_1_title <- "Eligible for treatment by the 2018 ACC/AHA Guideline"

#Combine Base
rbind(new_1_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title),
      old_1_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title)
      ) -> eligibility_df
eligibility_df[, group := paste0(group, ".")]

#Combine A1c and UACR
rbind(new_1_df_uacr_a1c %>% mutate(type = new_1_title),
      old_1_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title)
      ) -> eligibility_df_uacr_a1c
eligibility_df_uacr_a1c[, group := paste0(group, ".")]

#Combine UACR
rbind(new_1_df_uacr %>% mutate(type = new_1_title),
      old_1_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title)
) -> eligibility_df_uacr

eligibility_df_uacr[, group := paste0(group, ".")]

#Combine A1c
rbind(new_1_df_a1c %>% mutate(type = new_1_title),
      old_1_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title)
) -> eligibility_df_a1c
eligibility_df_a1c[, group := paste0(group, ".")]

#1/2
rbind(new_12a_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title),
      old_12b_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title)
) -> eligibility_df_12
eligibility_df_12[, group := paste0(group, ".")]

#2
rbind(new_2a_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title),
      old_2b_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title)
) -> eligibility_df_2
eligibility_df_2[, group := paste0(group, ".")]
```

### Plot I

#### Plot combined [not used]

```{r}
library(legendry)
eligibility_df[, stratum_group := interaction(stratum, group)]
eligibility_df[, stratum_group := factor(stratum_group,
                                         levels = eligibility_df$stratum_group %>%
                                           unique)]

#Plot
eligible_prop_fig_fn <- function(df) ggplot(data = df[value == "yes" & stratum != "ASCVD"],
           aes(y = prop_pe,
               ymin = prop_lci,
               ymax = prop_uci,
               x = stratum_group,
               fill = type,
               group = type
               )) +
      geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.7),
               width = 0.7,
               color = "black", lwd = 1) +
      geom_errorbar(width = 0.5, lwd = 1,
                    position = position_dodge(width = 0.7)) +
      #Plot scales
        scale_x_discrete(name = NULL
                         ) +
      scale_y_continuous(name = "Eligible proportion (%)",
                         breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.05),
                         expand = c(0, 0),
                         labels = function(x) (x * 100) 
                         ) +
      scale_fill_stata(name = NULL) +
      guides(x = legendry::guide_axis_nested(key = key_range_auto("\\."))) +
      #Title
      ggtitle("Proportion of US adults eligible for initiating LDL-C-lowering therapy according to the 2018 and 2026 ACC/AHA guidelines",
              subtitle = "Bars represent estimated proportions and error bars represent 95% confidence intervals.") +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
              plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
            text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
            axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
            axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
            axis.text = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
            legend.position = "bottom",
            legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
            legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
            legend.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
            legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
            legend.key.width = unit(2, "cm")
            ) +
      coord_cartesian(
        ylim = c(0, 1)
      ) +
      guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))

eligible_prop_fig_fn(eligibility_df) -> eligible_prop_fig

#Predicted risks
ggsave(eligible_prop_fig,
       filename = "Figures/New vs Old eligible.pdf",
       dpi = 600,
       width = 16, height = 9
       )

```

#### Panel A [Age]

##### Calculate

```{r}

age_get_svytotals <- function(design = sdata, var, n_cats = 2) {
  list(
    "20-24" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(20, 24)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "25-29" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(25, 29)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "30-34" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(30, 34)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "35-39" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(35, 39)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "40-44" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(40, 44)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "45-49" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(45, 49)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "50-54" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(50, 54)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "55-59" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(55, 59)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "60-64" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(60, 64)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "65-69" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(65, 69)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "70-74" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(70, 74)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "75 or older" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(75, 80)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)")
  ) %>% 
    {data.table(rbindlist(.) %>% select(-var),
                stratum = names(.) %>% rep(each = n_cats))} -> df
}


age_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ new_1) -> age_new_1_df
age_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ old_1) -> age_old_1_df

rbind(age_old_1_df %>% mutate(type = "Eligible for treatment by the 2018 ACC/AHA Guideline"),
```
