```{r}
      age_new_1_df %>% mutate(type = "Eligible for treatment by the 2026 ACC/AHA Guideline")) %>%
  data.table -> age_df

```


##### Plot

```{r}

ggplot(data = age_df[value == "yes" & stratum %nin% c("20-24", "25-29")],
       aes(x = stratum, 
           y = prop_pe,
           ymin = prop_lci,
           ymax = prop_uci,
           fill = type)
) +
  #Geoms
  geom_col(width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), lwd = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(width = 0.2, lwd = 1.25, color = "black",
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  #Title
  ggtitle(label = "Proportion of untreated US adults with a class I recommendation for initiating LDL-C-lowering treatment, according to age") +
  #Scales
  scale_fill_jama(name = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Age (years)") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Percent of Population (%)",
                     labels = function(x) x * 100,
                     breaks = seq(0, 100, 5)/100,
                     sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1)) -> age_cat_fig

ggsave(age_cat_fig,
       filename = "Figures/Age categorical.pdf",
       dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 9)

```



#### Panel B [Age/sex]

##### Calculate


```{r}

age_sex_get_svytotals <- function(design = sdata, var, n_cats = 2) {
  list(
    "20-29" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(20, 29)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "30-39" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(30, 39)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "40-49" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(40, 49)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "50-59" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(50, 59)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "60-69" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age %between% c(60, 69)), 
                          variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
    
    "70 or older" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age >= 70), 
                                variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)")
  ) %>% 
    {data.table(rbindlist(.) %>% select(-var),
                stratum = names(.) %>% rep(each = n_cats))} -> df
}

age_sex_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no" & sex == "male"), var = ~ new_1) %>% mutate(sex = "Male") -> age_male_new_1_df
age_sex_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no" & sex == "female"), var = ~ new_1) %>% mutate(sex = "Female") -> age_fem_new_1_df

age_sex_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no" & sex == "male"), var = ~ old_1) %>% mutate(sex = "Male") -> age_male_old_1_df
age_sex_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no" & sex == "female"), var = ~ old_1) %>% mutate(sex = "Female") -> age_fem_old_1_df

data.table(rbind(age_male_new_1_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title),
                 age_fem_new_1_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title), 
                 age_male_old_1_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title), 
                 age_fem_old_1_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title))) -> age_sex_df



age_sex_df[, sex := factor(sex, levels = c("Female", "Male"))]

```


##### Plot

```{r}

ggplot(
  data = age_sex_df[value == "yes" & stratum %nin% c("20-29")],
  aes(
    x = stratum,
    y = prop_pe,
    ymin = prop_lci,
    ymax = prop_uci,
    fill = type,
  )
) +
  #Geoms
  geom_col(width = 0.45, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), lwd = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(width = 0.2, lwd = 1.25, color = "black",
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  #Facet
  facet_wrap(~ sex, nrow = 1) +
  #Title
  ggtitle("Proportion of untreated US adults with a class I recommendation for pharmacotherapy, according to age and sex") +
  #Scales
  scale_fill_jama(name = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Age (years)") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Percent of Population (%)",
    labels = function(x) x * 100,
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 5)/100,
    sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)
  ) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm")
  ) -> age_cat_sex_fig

ggsave(age_cat_sex_fig,
       filename = "Figures/Age cat sex-stratified.pdf",
       dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 9)



```


#### Panel C [Race]

```{r}

ggplot(data = eligibility_df[value == "yes" & group %>% str_detect("Race")],
       aes(x = stratum, 
           y = prop_pe,
           ymin = prop_lci,
           ymax = prop_uci,
           fill = type)
) +
  #Geoms
  geom_col(width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), lwd = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(width = 0.2, lwd = 1.25, color = "black",
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  #Title
  ggtitle(label = "Proportion of untreated US adults with a class I recommendation for initiating LDL-C-lowering treatment, according to race/ethnicity") +
  #Scales
  scale_fill_jama(name = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Race and Ethnicity") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Percent of Population (%)",
                     labels = function(x) x * 100,
                     breaks = seq(0, 100, 5)/100,
                     sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.35)) -> race_fig

ggsave(race_fig,
       filename = "Figures/Race and ethnicity.pdf",
       dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 9)

```

#### Panel D [Comorbidities]

```{r}
eligibility_df[, comorbidity_group := fcase(stratum %>% str_detect("Diabetes"), "Diabetes",
                                            stratum %>% str_detect("CKD"), "CKD",
                                            stratum %>% str_detect("Obesity"), "Obesity")]

ggplot(data = eligibility_df[stratum != "ASCVD" & value == "yes" & group %>% str_detect("Comorbidities") & str_detect(stratum, "No ", negate = T)],
       aes(x = stratum, 
           y = prop_pe,
           ymin = prop_lci,
           ymax = prop_uci,
           fill = type)
) +
  #Geoms
  geom_col(width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), lwd = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(width = 0.2, lwd = 1.25, color = "black",
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ comorbidity_group, scales = "free_x") +
  #Title
  ggtitle(label = "Proportion of untreated US adults with a class I recommendation for initiating LDL-C-lowering treatment, according to the presence/absence of comorbidities") +
  #Scales
  scale_fill_jama(name = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Presence or Absence of Comorbidity") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Percent of Population (%)",
                     labels = function(x) x * 100,
                     breaks = seq(0, 100, 5)/100,
                     sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.85)) -> comorbidities_fig

ggsave(comorbidities_fig,
       filename = "Figures/Comorbidities.pdf",
       dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 9)

```

#### Combine A-D

##### Function

```{r}
rescale_ggplot <-
  theme(
  plot.title = element_text(size = 7, face = "bold", color = "transparent", hjust = 0),
  strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
  plot.subtitle = element_blank(),
  axis.text.x = element_text(size = rel(0.9), face = "bold"),
  axis.text.y = element_text(size = rel(0.9), face = "bold"),
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  axis.title.y = element_text(size = rel(0.85), face = "bold"),
  axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1.2),
  legend.key.width = unit(rel(2), "cm"),
  legend.key.height = unit(rel(0.5), "cm"),
  legend.text = element_text(size = rel(0.8), face = "bold")
  )

```

##### Combine

```{r}
library(ggpubr)
grid_2by2 <- function(width) {
  
  hrzl_coords = c(0.5, 0.5, 0, 1, 0, 1)
  vert_coords = c(0.04, 1, 0.52, 0.52, 0.04, 0.04)
  line_id = c(1, 1, 2, 2, 3, 3)
  grid.polygon(hrzl_coords, vert_coords, line_id, gp = gpar(lwd = width))
}

#Labels
fig1_labels <- c(
  "[A] Age",
  "[B] Age and Sex",
  "[C] Race and Ethnicity",
  "[D] Comorbidities"
) %>% paste0("   ", .)

#Plot
ggarrange(age_cat_fig + rescale_ggplot, 
          age_cat_sex_fig + rescale_ggplot,
          race_fig  + rescale_ggplot,
          comorbidities_fig + rescale_ggplot, 
          labels = fig1_labels,
          ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
          font.label = list(size = 13),
          common.legend = T,
          legend = "bottom",
          hjust = -0.01)

grid_2by2(width = 3)
fig1 <- grid.grab()
ggsave(fig1,
       filename = paste0("Figures/Figure 1.pdf"),
       device = cairo_pdf,
       width = 16,
       height = 9,
       dpi = 600)


```


##Plot I/II

#### Panel A [Age]

##### Calculate

```{r}



age_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ new_1) -> age_new_1_df
age_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ old_1) -> age_old_1_df
age_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ new_12a) -> age_new_12a_df
age_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ old_12b) -> age_old_12b_df

rbind(age_old_1_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title, class = "Class I"),
      age_new_1_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title, class = "Class I"),
      age_old_12b_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title, class = "Class II"),
      age_new_12a_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title, class = "Class II")) %>%
  data.table -> age_12_df

age_12_df[, class_type := fcase(
  class == "Class I" & type %>% str_detect("2026"), "Class I by 2026 Guideline",
  class == "Class II" & type %>% str_detect("2026"), "Class II by 2026 Guideline",
  class == "Class I" & type %>% str_detect("2018"), "Class I by 2018 Guideline",
  class == "Class II" & type %>% str_detect("2018"), "Class II by 2018 Guideline"
)]
setorder(age_12_df, -class)

```


##### Plot

```{r}

ggplot(data = age_12_df[value == "yes" & stratum %nin% c("20-24", "25-29")],
       aes(x = stratum, 
           y = prop_pe,
           ymin = prop_lci,
           ymax = prop_uci,
           fill = class_type,
           group = type)) +
  #Geoms
  geom_col(width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), lwd = 2) +
  # facet_grid2(. ~ stratum, scales = "free_x") +
  # geom_errorbar(width = 0.2, lwd = 1.25, color = "black",
  #               position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  #Title
  ggtitle(label = "Proportion of untreated US adults with a class I/II recommendation for initiating LDL-C-lowering treatment, according to age") +
  #Scales
  scale_fill_jama(name = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Age (years)") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Percent of Population (%)",
                     labels = function(x) x * 100,
                     breaks = seq(0, 100, 5)/100,
                     expand = c(0, 0),
                     sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm"),
        
      panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 1.25),
      panel.spacing.x = unit(0, "pt"),
      strip.background.x = element_blank(), 
        strip.placement = "outside",
      strip.text.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 1.03)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) -> age_cat_12_fig

ggsave(age_cat_12_fig,
       filename = "Figures/Age categorical [I and II].pdf",
       dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 9)

```



#### Panel B [Age/sex]

##### Calculate


```{r}

#12
age_sex_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no" & sex == "male"), var = ~ new_12a) %>% mutate(sex = "Male") -> age_male_new_12a_df
age_sex_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no" & sex == "female"), var = ~ new_12a) %>% mutate(sex = "Female") -> age_fem_new_12a_df
age_sex_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no" & sex == "male"), var = ~ old_12b) %>% mutate(sex = "Male") -> age_male_old_12b_df
age_sex_get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no" & sex == "female"), var = ~ old_12b) %>% mutate(sex = "Female") -> age_fem_old_12b_df

data.table(rbind(age_male_new_12a_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title, class = "Class II"),
                 age_fem_new_12a_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title, class = "Class II"), 
                 age_male_old_12b_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title, class = "Class II"), 
                 age_fem_old_12b_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title, class = "Class II"),
                 age_male_new_1_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title, class = "Class I"),
                 age_fem_new_1_df %>% mutate(type = new_1_title, class = "Class I"), 
                 age_male_old_1_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title, class = "Class I"), 
                 age_fem_old_1_df %>% mutate(type = old_1_title, class = "Class I")
                 )
           
           ) -> age_sex_12_df



age_sex_12_df[, sex := factor(sex, levels = c("Female", "Male"))]

#Class/type
age_sex_12_df[, class_type := fcase(
  class == "Class I" & type %>% str_detect("2026"), "Class I by 2026 Guideline",
  class == "Class II" & type %>% str_detect("2026"), "Class II by 2026 Guideline",
  class == "Class I" & type %>% str_detect("2018"), "Class I by 2018 Guideline",
  class == "Class II" & type %>% str_detect("2018"), "Class II by 2018 Guideline"
)]

```


##### Plot

```{r}

ggplot(
  data = age_sex_12_df[value == "yes" & stratum %nin% c("20-29")],
  aes(
    x = stratum,
    y = prop_pe,
    ymin = prop_lci,
    ymax = prop_uci,
    fill = class_type,
    group = type
  )
) +
  #Geoms
  geom_col(width = 0.45, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), lwd = 2) +
  # geom_errorbar(width = 0.2, lwd = 1.25, color = "black",
  #               position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  #Facet
  facet_wrap(~ sex, nrow = 1) +
  #Title
  ggtitle("Proportion of untreated US adults with a class I recommendation for pharmacotherapy, according to age and sex") +
  #Scales
  scale_fill_jama(name = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Age (years)") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Percent of Population (%)",
    labels = function(x) x * 100,
    breaks = seq(0, 100, 5)/100,
sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)) +
  
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm"))  +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1))  -> age_cat_sex_12_fig

ggsave(age_cat_sex_12_fig,
       filename = "Figures/Age cat sex-stratified [I or II].pdf",
       dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 9)



```


#### Panel C [Race]

```{r}

#1/2
eligibility_df_1_2_sep_combined <- rbind(
  eligibility_df %>% filter(stratum != "ASCVD") %>% select(-stratum_group, - comorbidity_group) %>% mutate(class = "Class I"),
  eligibility_df_12 %>% mutate(class = "Class II")
)


#Class/type
eligibility_df_1_2_sep_combined[, class_type := fcase(
  class == "Class I" & type %>% str_detect("2026"), "Class I by 2026 Guideline",
  class == "Class II" & type %>% str_detect("2026"), "Class II by 2026 Guideline",
  class == "Class I" & type %>% str_detect("2018"), "Class I by 2018 Guideline",
  class == "Class II" & type %>% str_detect("2018"), "Class II by 2018 Guideline"
)]

#Reorder
eligibility_df_1_2_sep_combined[, class := fct_relevel(class, c("Class II", "Class I"))]
setorder(eligibility_df_1_2_sep_combined, class)

#Plot
ggplot(data = eligibility_df_1_2_sep_combined[value == "yes" & group %>% str_detect("Race")],
       aes(x = stratum, 
           y = prop_pe,
           ymin = prop_lci,
           ymax = prop_uci,
           fill = class_type,
           group = type)) +
  #Geoms
  geom_col(width = 0.4, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), lwd = 2) +
  # geom_errorbar(width = 0.2, lwd = 1.25, color = "black",
  #               position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
  #Title
  ggtitle(label = "Proportion of untreated US adults with a class I/II recommendation for initiating LDL-C-lowering treatment, according to race/ethnicity") +
  #Scales
  scale_fill_jama(name = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Race and Ethnicity") +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Percent of Population (%)",
                     labels = function(x) x * 100,
                     breaks = seq(0, 100, 5)/100,
                     sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.45)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) -> race_12_fig

ggsave(race_12_fig,
       filename = "Figures/Race and ethnicity [I and II].pdf",
       dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 9)

```

#### Panel D [Comorbidities]

```{r}
eligibility_df_1_2_sep_combined[, comorbidity_group := fcase(stratum %>% str_detect("Diabetes"), "Diabetes",
                                            stratum %>% str_detect("CKD"), "CKD",
                                            stratum %>% str_detect("Obesity"), "Obesity")]



ggplot(data = eligibility_df_1_2_sep_combined[stratum != "ASCVD" & value == "yes" & stratum %>% str_detect("No ", negate = T) & group %>% str_detect("Comorbidities")],
       aes(x = interaction(stratum, type), 
           y = prop_pe,
           ymin = prop_lci,
           ymax = prop_uci,
           fill = class_type,
           group = class_type)
) +
  #Geoms
  geom_col(width = 0.4, lwd = 2, position = position_identity()) +
  # geom_errorbar(width = 0.2, lwd = 1.25, color = "black", position = "stack") +
  facet_grid(. ~ comorbidity_group, scales = "free_x")  +
  #Title
  ggtitle(label = "Proportion of untreated US adults with a class I/II recommendation for initiating LDL-C-lowering treatment, according to the presence/absence of comorbidities") +
  #Scales
  scale_fill_jama(name = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = "Presence or Absence of Comorbidity", labels = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Percent of Population (%)",
                     labels = function(x) x * 100,
                     breaks = seq(0, 100, 5)/100,
                     expand = c(0, 0),
                     sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 0.92)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) -> comorbidities_12_fig

ggsave(comorbidities_12_fig,
       filename = "Figures/Comorbidities [I or II].pdf",
       dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 9)


```

#### Combine A-D
```{r}
library(ggpubr)
grid_2by2 <- function(width) {
  
  hrzl_coords = c(0.5, 0.5, 0, 1, 0, 1)
  vert_coords = c(0.04, 1, 0.52, 0.52, 0.04, 0.04)
  line_id = c(1, 1, 2, 2, 3, 3)
  grid.polygon(hrzl_coords, vert_coords, line_id, gp = gpar(lwd = width))
}

#Labels
fig1_labels <- c(
  "[A] Age",
  "[B] Age and Sex",
  "[C] Race and Ethnicity",
  "[D] Comorbidities"
) %>% paste0("   ", .)

#Plot
ggarrange(age_cat_12_fig + rescale_ggplot, 
          age_cat_sex_12_fig + rescale_ggplot,
          race_12_fig  + rescale_ggplot,
          comorbidities_12_fig + rescale_ggplot, 
          labels = fig1_labels,
          ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
          font.label = list(size = 13),
          common.legend = T,
          legend = "bottom",
          hjust = -0.01)

grid_2by2(width = 3)
fig2 <- grid.grab()
ggsave(fig2,
       filename = paste0("Figures/Figure 2.pdf"),
       device = cairo_pdf,
       width = 16,
       height = 9,
       dpi = 600)


```



##Tabulate

```{r}



#Base
list_t1_base <- list(title = "Table 1. US adults not currently taking LDL-C-lowering medications eligible for pharmacological treatment, according to the 2018 and 2026 ACC/AHA Guidelines.",
                new = new_1_df,
                old = old_1_df,
                diff = abs_diff_init_df,
                name = "Table 1"
                )

#A1c
list_t1_a1c <- list(title = "Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant]. US adults not currently taking LDL-C-lowering medications eligible for pharmacological treatment, according to the 2018 and 2026 ACC/AHA Guidelines (using HbA1c for PREVENT).",
                new = new_1_df_a1c,
                old = old_1_df,
                diff = abs_diff_init_df_a1c,
                name = "Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant]"
                )
#UACR
list_t1_uacr <- list(title = "Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant]. US adults not currently taking LDL-C-lowering medications eligible for pharmacological treatment, according to the 2018 and 2026 ACC/AHA Guidelines (using UACR for PREVENT).",
                new = new_1_df_uacr,
                old = old_1_df,
                diff = abs_diff_init_df_uacr,
                name = "Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant]"
                )

#A1c/UACR
list_t1_uacr_a1c <- list(title = "Supplementary Table 6. US adults not currently taking LDL-C-lowering medications eligible for pharmacological treatment, according to the 2018 and 2026 ACC/AHA Guidelines (using HbA1c and UACR for PREVENT).",
                new = new_1_df_uacr_a1c,
                old = old_1_df,
                diff = abs_diff_init_df_uacr_a1c,
                name = "Supplementary Table 6"
                )


#Combined 1 and 2
list_t1_12 <- list(title = "Table 2. US adults not currently taking LDL-C-lowering medications eligible for pharmacological treatment, according to the 2018 and 2026 ACC/AHA Guidelines (additionally including class II recommendations with risk thresholds of 5-7.5% and 3-5% using the PCEs and PREVENT-ASCVD respectively).",
                new = new_12a_df,
                old = old_12b_df,
                diff = abs_diff_init_df_12,
                name = "Table 2"
                )

list_t1_2 <- list(title = "Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant]. US adults not currently taking LDL-C-lowering medications eligible for pharmacological treatment, according to the 2018 and 2026 ACC/AHA Guidelines (including only class II recommendations with risk thresholds of 5-7.5% and 3-5% using the PCEs and PREVENT-ASCVD respectively).",
                new = new_2a_df,
                old = old_2b_df,
                diff = abs_diff_init_df_2,
                name = "Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant]"
                )





t1_lists <- list(list_t1_base, list_t1_12, list_t1_2,
                 list_t1_a1c, list_t1_uacr, list_t1_uacr_a1c)

lapply(t1_lists, 
       function(t1_list) {
#Tabulate
cbind(
  #Old
  t1_list$old[value == "yes", .(`Variable` = group,
                            `Strata` = stratum,
                            `Proportion [95% CI], % ` = prop_pe_ci,
                            `Number [95% CI], millions ` = pe_ci)],
  #New, all
  t1_list$new[value == "yes", .(
                            `Proportion [95% CI], %  ` = prop_pe_ci,
                            `Number [95% CI], millions  ` = pe_ci)],
  t1_list$diff[, .(`Difference vs 2018 Guideline, % [95% CI] ` = prop_pe_ci,
                                    `Difference vs 2018 Guideline, millions [95% CI] ` = pe_ci
                                    )]
) %>%
  flextable %>%
  bold(j = c(1, 2)) %>%
  add_header_row(values = c(
    "",
    "Eligible for treatment by the 2018 ACC/AHA Guideline",
    "Eligible for treatment by the 2026 ACC/AHA Guideline",
    "Difference"
  ),
  colwidths = c(2, 2, 2, 2)
             ) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(explanation_line), colwidths = 8) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(abbs_line), colwidths = 8) %>%
  flextable_aes(table_title = t1_list$title) %>%
  merge_v() %>%
  fontsize(size = 9) %>%
  width(width = 0.9) -> t1_object
  save_as_docx(t1_object, path = paste0("Tables/", t1_list$name, ".docx"))
  
  t1_object
}) -> t1_t_list



```

##B. CACS

### Get numbers

```{r}

get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"), var = ~ cacs_eligible) -> cacs_df


```


### Tabulate

```{r}
# flextable(cacs_df[value == "yes" & stratum %nin% c("Below 40", "ASCVD", "Diabetes"), 
#                   .(`Variable` = group,
#                             `Strata` = stratum,
#                             `Proportion [95% CI], %` = prop_pe_ci,
#                             `Number [95% CI], millions` = pe_ci)]) %>%
#   bold(j = c(1, 2)) %>%
#     add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(explanation_line), colwidths = 4) %>%
#   flextable_aes(table_title = "Table 5. US adults not already on LDL-C-lowering therapy and potentially eligible for coronary artery calcium assessment per the 2026 ACC/AHA Dysylipidemia Guideline.") %>%
#   merge_v() %>%
#   add_footer_lines(values = as_paragraph(abbs_line)) -> cacs_t
#   save_as_docx(cacs_t, path = "Tables/Table 5.docx")

```


##C. Low-risk 10-year but high-risk longer term

### Get numbers

```{r}

sdata$variables[new_2a_ldl30 == "yes" & new_1 == "no", .(n = sum(weight)), by = age] -> long_short_df
long_short_df[order(age)] -> long_short_df
long_short_filler <- data.table(age = seq(20, 80), n = 0)
long_short_df <- rbind(long_short_df, long_short_filler[age %nin% long_short_df[, age]])

long_short_df[, cum_n := cumsum(n)]

#long_short_ages <- list(c(30, 39), c(40, 49), c(50, 59), c(30, 59))
long_short_ages <- list(c(30, 59), c(30, 34), c(35, 39), c(40, 44), c(45, 49), c(50, 54), c(55, 59))


sex_filters <- list(c("male"), c("female"), c("male", "female"))


#Loop over sex and age-groups
lapply(sex_filters, 
       function(sex_filter) {
#Loop over age-brackets
lapply(long_short_ages, 
       function(age_bracket) {
  
         
         filter_exp <- expression(age %between% age_bracket & prevent_10yr < 0.03 & sex %in% sex_filter & statin == "no" & new_1 == "no")
         #Total 2a
  svytotal_df(design = sdata %>% subset(eval(filter_exp)),
            variables = ~ new_2a_ldl30
            ) -> df_2a
    df_2a[, var := "Total number eligible based on LDL-C or 30-year risk"]
  
  #Total LDL > 160
  svytotal_df(design = sdata %>% subset(eval(filter_exp)),
            variables = ~ ldl > 160 & ldl <= 189
            ) -> df_ldl160
  df_ldl160[, var := "LDL between 160-189 mg/dL"]
  
  #Total high long-term risk
  svytotal_df(design = sdata %>% subset(eval(filter_exp)),
            variables = ~ prevent_30yr >= 0.1
            ) -> df_prevent30
  df_prevent30[, var := "30-year risk of 10% or greater"]
  
  #2a without 1a
  svytotal_df(design = sdata %>% subset(eval(filter_exp) & new_1 == "no" & statin == "no"),
            variables = ~ (age > 0)
            ) -> df_2a_only
  df_2a_only[, var := "Not using statins and no alternative class I indication"]
  
  #Bind
  rbind(df_2a, df_ldl160, df_prevent30, df_2a_only) -> combined_df
  
  #Add age
  combined_df[, age := paste0(age_bracket[1], " to ", age_bracket[2])]
  combined_df[, sex := ifelse(length(sex_filter) == 1, sex_filter %>% str_to_title, "Overall")]
  
  #Return
  combined_df
       }) 
         
       }
  
  ) -> new_2a_ldl30_df

new_2a_ldl30_df <- new_2a_ldl30_df %>% lapply(rbindlist) %>% rbindlist
new_2a_ldl30_df <- new_2a_ldl30_df[value %in% c("yes", T)]


#N in results
svytotal_df(design = subset(sdata, age %between% c(30, 59) & prevent_10yr < 0.03),
            variables = ~ (statin)) -> new_2a_ldl30_statin

svytotal_df(design = subset(sdata, age %between% c(30, 59) & prevent_10yr < 0.03 & statin == "no"),
            variables = ~ (new_1)) -> new_2a_ldl30_new_1

svytotal_df(design = subset(sdata, age %between% c(30, 59) & prevent_10yr < 0.03 & statin == "no" & new_1 == "no"),
            variables = ~ (age > 0)) -> new_2a_ldl30_total_n 

new_2a_ldl30_df[sex == "Overall" & age == "30 to 59"]
new_2a_ldl30_df[sex %in% c("Male", "Female") & str_detect(var, "Total") & age == "55 to 59"]

```

### Plot

```{r}

new_2a_ldl30_df[, age := fct_relevel(age, c("30 to 34", "35 to 39", "40 to 44", "45 to 49", "50 to 54", "55 to 59"))]
new_2a_ldl30_df[, var_2 := fifelse(var %in% 
                               c("LDL between 160-189 mg/dL",
                                 "Total number eligible based on LDL-C or 30-year risk"),
                             1,
                             fifelse(var == "Not using statins and no alternative class I indication", 2, NA)
)]

new_2a_ldl30_df[, sex := fct_relevel(sex, c("Overall", "Female", "Male"))]
new_2a_ldl30_df[, var := fct_relevel(var,
                               c("Not using statins and no alternative class I indication",
                               "Total number eligible based on LDL-C or 30-year risk",
                               "LDL between 160-189 mg/dL"))]
new_2a_ldl30_df 
new_2a_ldl30_df[, var2 := fcase(var == "Not using statins and no alternative class I indication", "Not eligible",
                          var == "Total number eligible based on LDL-C or 30-year risk", "30-year PREVENT-ASCVD risk ≥10%",
                          var == "LDL between 160-189 mg/dL", "LDL between 160-189 mg/dL"
                          )]
new_2a_ldl30_df[, var2 := fct_relevel(var2, c("LDL between 160-189 mg/dL", "30-year risk of 10% or greater", "Not eligible"))]
setorder(new_2a_ldl30_df, sex, age, var)


library(ggh4x)
new_2a_ldl30_df[var == "Total number eligible based on LDL-C or 30-year risk", 
          .(part = pe,
            age = age),
          by = sex] -> new_2a_ldl30_df_part

new_2a_ldl30_df[var == "Not using statins and no alternative class I indication", 
          .(total = pe, age),
          by = sex] -> new_2a_ldl30_df_total

merge(new_2a_ldl30_df_part, new_2a_ldl30_df_total[age != "30 to 59"]) -> new_2a_ldl30_df_prop
new_2a_ldl30_df_prop[, prop := part/total]
new_2a_ldl30_df_prop[, prop_scaled := rescale(prop, to = total %>% range, from = prop %>% range)]

new_2a_ldl30_df[var == "Not using statins and no alternative class I indication", pe, by = sex]



ggplot(data = new_2a_ldl30_df[age != "30 to 59" & var != "30-year risk of 10% or greater"],
       aes(x = age, 
           y = pe,
           ymin = lci,
           ymax = uci,
           fill = var2)
) +
  #Geoms
  geom_col(width = 0.8, alpha = 1, position = position_identity(), lwd = 2) +
  geom_line(data = new_2a_ldl30_df_prop[age != "30 to 59"], inherit.aes = F, lwd = 1.5,
            aes(x = age, y = prop_scaled, group = sex)
            ) +
  geom_point(data = new_2a_ldl30_df_prop[age != "30 to 59"], inherit.aes = F, size = 4,
            aes(x = age, y = prop_scaled, group = sex)
  ) +
  
  geom_text(data = new_2a_ldl30_df_prop[age != "30 to 59"], inherit.aes = F, size = 5, fontface = "bold",
            aes(x = age, y = prop_scaled, group = sex, label = percent(prop, 0.1), 
                hjust = 1, vjust = -0.8)) +
  # geom_errorbar(data =  new_2a_ldl30_df[var %in% c("Total number eligible based on LDL-C or 30-year risk", "Not using statins and no alternative class I indication")],
  #               aes(ymin = lci,
  #                   ymax = uci),
  #               width = 0.2, lwd = 1.25, color = "black") +
  facet_nested(. ~ sex, scales = "free") +
  #Title
  #ggtitle("Number of persons with a low short-term risk eligible based on an LDL-C 160-189 mg/dL or a 30-year risk of 10% or higher") +
  #Scales
  scale_fill_jama(name = NULL) +
  scale_x_discrete(name = NULL, labels = function(x) x %>% str_replace(" to ", "-")) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Number of US adults, in millions",
                     labels = function(x) x/1000000,
                     breaks = seq(1000000, 100000000, 2000000),
                     sec.axis = sec_axis(trans = ~ rescale(., from = new_2a_ldl30_df_prop$total %>% range, to = new_2a_ldl30_df_prop$prop %>% range), 
                                         name = "% of Adults in the Age Group Recommended for Statins (IIa)",
                                         labels = function(x) x * 100,
                                         breaks = seq(0, 100, 5)/100)
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm")
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) -> fig4

ggsave(fig4,
       filename = "Figures/Figure 4.pdf",
       device = cairo_pdf,
       dpi = 600, width = 16, height = 9)


```


### Mid-aged & sex Simple bars

####Calculate

```{r}
#Age-sex primary prevention filter:
age_sex_filter <- expression(llt == "no" & age %between% c(40, 65) & ascvd == "no" & ldl < 190 & dm == "no")


##Proportions
#Female/prevent
svytotal_df(design = subset(sdata, eval(age_sex_filter) & sex == "female"  & egfr >= 60),
            variables = ~ new_1) -> mid_aged_fem_new_prop
#Male/prevent
svytotal_df(design = subset(sdata, eval(age_sex_filter) & sex == "male"  & egfr >= 60),
            variables = ~ new_1) -> mid_aged_male_new_prop


#Female/PCE
svytotal_df(design = subset(sdata, eval(age_sex_filter) & sex == "female"),
            variables = ~ old_1) -> mid_aged_fem_old_prop
#Male/PCE
svytotal_df(design = subset(sdata, eval(age_sex_filter) & sex == "male"),
            variables = ~ old_1) -> mid_aged_male_old_prop


#Rbind
mid_aged_prop_df <- rbind(mid_aged_fem_new_prop %>% mutate(type = "PREVENT-based risk of 5% or more", sex = "Females"),
                       mid_aged_male_new_prop %>% mutate(type = "PREVENT-based risk of 5% or more", sex = "Males"),
                       mid_aged_fem_old_prop %>% mutate(type = "PCE-based risk of 7.5% or more", sex = "Females"),
                       mid_aged_male_old_prop %>% mutate(type = "PCE-based risk of 7.5% or more", sex = "Males"))


```




### Sex-based risk Histograms

####Plot

```{r}
#Create ratio of risks
sdata$variables[, pce_prevent_ratio := prevent_10yr/pce_10yr]
# svyquantile(design = sdata, ~ pce_prevent_ratio, quantiles = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)) -> ratio_qs
hist_filter <- expr(llt == "no" & age %between% c(40, 69) & egfr >= 60 & ascvd == "no" & ldl < 190 & dm == "no")

sdata$variables[eval(hist_filter), .(q = wtd.quantile(x = pce_prevent_ratio, weights = weight, c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75))), by = sex] -> ratio_qs

ratio_qs[, q_format := round(q, 2) %>% format(nsmall = 2)]

#Risks
sdata$variables[eval(hist_filter), 
                .(pce_qs = wtd.quantile(x = pce_10yr, weights = weight, c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)),
                  prevent_qs = wtd.quantile(x = prevent_10yr, weights = weight, c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75))
                  ), 
                by = sex] -> risk_qs
risk_qs[, let(pce_qs_format = percent(pce_qs, 0.1))]
risk_qs[, let(prevent_qs_format = percent(prevent_qs, 0.1))]

#Risk differences
svyglm(design = sdata %>% subset(eval(hist_filter)),
       family = Gamma(link = "log"),
       formula = pce_prevent_ratio ~ 1 + sex
       ) %>% summary

#Create labels
males_label <- paste0("Median ratio: ", ratio_qs[sex == "male", q_format][2], "; IQR: ", ratio_qs[sex == "male", q_format][1], " to ", ratio_qs[sex == "male", q_format][3])
females_label <- paste0("Median ratio: ", ratio_qs[sex == "female", q_format][2], "; IQR: ", ratio_qs[sex == "female", q_format][1], " to ", ratio_qs[sex == "female", q_format][3])
label_size <- 5
males_ypos <- -2.8e06
females_ypos <- 2.9e06

#Plot
ggplot(data = sdata$variables[sex == "female" & eval(hist_filter)],
       aes(x = pce_prevent_ratio,
           y = after_stat(count),
           weight = weight
       )) +
  #Histograms
  geom_histogram(color = "black",lwd = 0.5,
                 binwidth = 0.05,
                 aes(fill = "Females")
  ) +
  geom_histogram(data = sdata$variables[sex == "male"  & eval(hist_filter)], 
                 inherit.aes = F,
                 binwidth = 0.05,
                 aes(y = - after_stat(count),
                     x = pce_prevent_ratio,
                     weight = weight,
                     fill = "Males"),
                 color = "black",lwd = 0.5
  ) +
  #Horizontal line
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lwd = 1.5) +
  #Geoms denoting median and IQR
  #Females
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ratio_qs[sex == "female", q][1],
                    xmax = ratio_qs[sex == "female", q][3],
                    y = females_ypos,
                    color = "Females"),
                 lwd = 1.25, height = 150000
                ) +
    geom_point(aes(x = ratio_qs[sex == "female", q][2],
                    y = females_ypos,
                    color = "Females"
                    ),
                  size = 5
                ) +
  #Males
    geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = ratio_qs[sex == "male", q][1],
                    xmax = ratio_qs[sex == "male", q][3],
                    y = males_ypos,
                    color = "Males"),
                 lwd = 1.25, height = 150000
                ) +
    geom_point(aes(x = ratio_qs[sex == "male", q][2],
                    y = males_ypos,
                    color = "Males"
                    ),
                  size = 5
                ) +
  annotate(geom = "text",
           x = ratio_qs[sex == "male", q][2],
                    y = males_ypos*1.1,
           label = males_label,
           size = label_size,
           fontface = "bold"
           ) +
    annotate(geom = "text",
           x = ratio_qs[sex == "female", q][2],
                    y = females_ypos*1.1,
           label = females_label,
           size = label_size,
           fontface = "bold"
           ) +
  #Scales
  scale_fill_nejm(name = NULL,
                  breaks = c("Females", "Males")) +
  scale_color_nejm(name = NULL,
                  breaks = c("Females", "Males")) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Number of US Adults, N",
                     breaks = seq(-100000000, 100000000, 1e06) %>% Filter(., f = function(x) x != 0),
                     expand = c(0.03, 0),
                     labels = function(x) abs(x) %>% comma) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Ratio of 10-year ASCVD PREVENT-based risk to PCE-based risk",
                     breaks = c(0.5, 1, 2),
                     labels = c("0.5\n(Half the PCE-estimated risk)", "1.0\n(no change)", "2.0\n(double the PCE-estimated risk)"),
                     expand = c(0.01, 0),
                     trans = "log") +
  #Title
  #ggtitle("Ratio of PREVENT-based to PCE-based 10-year ASCVD risks in males and females aged 40-69 years") +
  #Theme
  theme_bw() +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(byrow = TRUE)) +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 23),
        plot.title=element_text(face = "bold",hjust = 0.0, size = 16),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 1.2),
        plot.margin = margin(0.5, 1, 0.5, 1, "cm"),
        legend.position = c(0.85, 0.95),
        legend.key.width = unit(2, "cm"),
        legend.spacing.y = unit(8, 'lines'),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.2, 3)) -> fig4



#Plot
ggsave(fig4,
       filename = "Figures/Figure 4.pdf",
       dpi = 600,
       width = 16, height = 9
)


```


##D. Eligible for intensification

#### Functions

##### Function for LDL categories

```{r}
#Experiment
#design = subset(sdata, eval(four_group_filters[[3]]) & llt == "yes"); var = ~ ldl_cat

#Function
get_svytotals_mod <- function(design = sdata, var, n_cats = 2) {
#Get total number of eligible patients (10%+) according to PREVENT
list(
  #Overall
  " " = svytotal_df(design = design, 
                    variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Overall"),
  #Age-stratified
  "Below 65" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age < 65), 
                        variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
  "65 or older" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age >= 65), 
                        variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
  #Sex-stratified
  "Female" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, sex == "female"), 
                         variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Sex"),
  "Male" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, sex == "male"), 
                       variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Sex"),
  #Race-stratified
  "NH Black" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design,  race == "Non-Hispanic Black"), 
                           variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity"),
  "NH White" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design,  race == "Non-Hispanic White"), 
                           variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity"),
  "NH Asian" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, race == "Non-Hispanic Asian"), 
                           variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity"),
  "Hispanic" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, race == "Hispanic"), 
                           variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity")
) %>% 
  #Bind together
  {data.table(rbindlist(.) %>% select(-var),
              stratum = names(.) %>% rep(each = n_cats))} -> df
  
}


```

##### Function for goals

```{r}
#Experiment
#design = subset(sdata, eval(four_group_filters[[3]]) & llt == "yes"); var = ~ ldl_cat

eight_groups <- c(
  expression(ascvd == "yes" & vh_risk_ascvd == "no"),
  expression(vh_risk_ascvd == "yes"),
  expression(dm == "yes" & rf_enhancers_2026 == "yes"),
  expression(dm == "yes" & rf_enhancers_2026 == "no")
)


#Function
get_svytotals_goals <- function(design = sdata, var, n_cats = 2) {
#Get total number of eligible patients (10%+) according to PREVENT
list(
  #Overall
  " " = svytotal_df(design = design, 
                    variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Overall"),
  #Age-stratified
  "Below 65" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, vh_risk_ascvd == "yes"), 
                        variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
  "65 or older" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, age >= 65), 
                        variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Age (years)"),
  #Sex-stratified
  "Female" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, sex == "female"), 
                         variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Sex"),
  "Male" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, sex == "male"), 
                       variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Sex"),
  #Race-stratified
  "NH Black" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design,  race == "Non-Hispanic Black"), 
                           variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity"),
  "NH White" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design,  race == "Non-Hispanic White"), 
                           variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity"),
  "NH Asian" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, race == "Non-Hispanic Asian"), 
                           variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity"),
  "Hispanic" = svytotal_df(design = subset(design, race == "Hispanic"), 
                           variables = var) %>% mutate(group = "Race and ethnicity")
) %>% 
  #Bind together
  {data.table(rbindlist(.) %>% select(-var),
              stratum = names(.) %>% rep(each = n_cats))} -> df
  
}


```


###LDL

##### Get numbers

```{r}
#LDL weights
sdata_ldl <- svydesign(data = data,
                       ids = data$SDMVPSU,
                       strata = data$SDMVSTRA,
                       weights = data$weight_ldl,
                       nest = TRUE)
sdata_ldl <- subset(sdata_ldl, age >= 20 & llt == "yes" & new_1 == "yes")


#Total
get_svytotals_mod(design = subset(sdata_ldl, new_1 == "yes"),
              var = ~ goal_need_ldl, 
              n_cats = 4) -> goal_need_ldl_cat_df

#Using LLT
four_group_filters <- c(expr(ascvd == "yes"), 
                        expr(dm == "yes" & ascvd == "no"), 
                        expr(pre_ttt_ldl >= 190 & dm == "no" & ascvd == "no"),
                        expr(new_1 == "yes" & pre_ttt_ldl < 190 & dm == "no" & ascvd == "no")
                        )

#Loop over 4 groups
lapply(
  four_group_filters[1:4],
  function(group_filter) {
    get_svytotals_mod(design = subset(sdata_ldl, eval(group_filter) & llt == "yes"),
              var = ~ ldl_cat, 
              n_cats = 4)
    
  }
) -> llt_ldl_cat_list


names(llt_ldl_cat_list) <- c("ASCVD",
                                       "DM without ASCVD",
                                       "LDL-C of ≥190 mg/dL or greater without ASCVD or DM",
                                       "Primary prevention without DM, ASCVD, and pre-treatment LDL-C <190 mg/dL")


#N for results
llt_ldl_cat_list$`DM without ASCVD`[c(1, 2), prop_pe %>% sum %>% percent(0.1)]
llt_ldl_cat_list$ASCVD[c(1), prop_pe %>% sum %>% percent(0.1)]


#Loop
# lapply(
#   four_group_filters[1:4],
#   function(group_filter) {
#     get_svytotals_mod(design = subset(sdata, eval(group_filter) & llt == "yes"),
#               var = ~ goal_need_ldl, 
#               n_cats = 4)
#     
#   }
# ) -> llt_goal_need_ldl_cat_list
# 
# names(llt_goal_need_ldl_cat_list) <- c("ASCVD",
#                                        "DM without ASCVD",
#                                        "LDL-C of 190 mg/dL or greater without ASCVD or DM",
#                                        "PREVENT-based 10-year ASCVD risk of 5% or greater")

```

##### Plot [not used]

```{r}

#Palettes
palette_map <- c(
  "LDL-C <55 mg/dL" = "#CCEBC5",
  "LDL-C of 100 mg/dL or greater" = "#FBB4AE",
  "LDL-C 55-69 mg/dL" = "#B3CDE3",
  "LDL-C 70-99 mg/dL" = "#DECBE4"
)

#Loop
lapply(1:length(llt_ldl_cat_list),
       function(i) {
         
         #Assign df
         llt_ldl_cat_df <- llt_ldl_cat_list[[i]]
         #Modify for plotting
llt_ldl_cat_df[, stratum_group := interaction(stratum, group %>% paste0("."))]
llt_ldl_cat_df[stratum == " ", stratum := "Overall"]
llt_ldl_cat_df[stratum == "Overall", group := ""]
llt_ldl_cat_df[, stratum_group := factor(stratum_group,
                                         levels = llt_ldl_cat_df$stratum_group %>%
                                           unique %>% rev)]


llt_ldl_cat_df[, value := fct_relevel(value, c(
  "LDL-C <55 mg/dL",
                                "LDL-C 55-69 mg/dL",
                                "LDL-C 70-99 mg/dL",
                                "LDL-C of 100 mg/dL or greater" ))]

llt_ldl_cat_df[order(value)] -> llt_ldl_cat_df

#Create geom_text aestetics
llt_ldl_cat_df[, geom_text_pos := c(0, prop_pe[1], prop_pe[1] + prop_pe[2],  prop_pe[1] + prop_pe[2] + prop_pe[3]), 
              by = stratum]
llt_ldl_cat_df[, diff(geom_text_pos), by = stratum_group]

llt_ldl_cat_df[, diff(geom_text_pos)]
llt_ldl_cat_df[, geom_text_label := 
                paste0(percent(prop_pe, 1),
                       "\n", pe %>% tomil, "m")]
llt_ldl_cat_df[, geom_text_label := str_replace(geom_text_label, "0.0m", "<0.1m")]
llt_ldl_cat_df <- llt_ldl_cat_df[round(prop_pe*100) == 0, geom_text_label := ""]
llt_ldl_cat_df[, geom_text_pos := {
  x <- geom_text_pos
  space_adj = 0.05
  for (i in 2:.N) {
    if ( ((x[i] - x[i-1]) < 0.06) & x[i] > 0.01) {
      x[i] <- x[i-1] + 0.06
    }
  }
  x
}, by = stratum_group]


#llt_goal_need_ldl_cat_df[, value := droplevels(value)]
#llt_goal_need_ldl_cat_df[geom_text_label  %>% str_detect("0% \\[0"), geom_text_label := ""]
#llt_goal_need_ldl_cat_df[pe < 1e05 & prop_pe > 0.005, geom_text_label := paste0(percent(prop_pe, 1), " [", round(pe/1e6, 2), "m]")]
#Angles vector
angles_vector <- c(0)


label_size <- 5
#Plot
ggplot(data = llt_ldl_cat_df,
       aes(x = prop_pe,
           ymin = prop_lci,
           ymax = prop_uci,
           y = stratum_group,
           fill = value
           )) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack(reverse = T),
           width = 0.7,
           color = "black",
           show.legend = T) +
  geom_text(hjust = -0.1, fontface = "bold", size = 2.5,
            aes(x = geom_text_pos,
                label = geom_text_label)) +
  #Plot scales
    scale_y_discrete(name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(name = "Proportion (%)",
                     breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.05),
                     expand = c(0, 0),
                     labels = function(x) (x * 100),
                     sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)
                     ) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = NULL,
                    values = palette_map,
                    drop = F
                    ) +
  guides(y = legendry::guide_axis_nested(key = key_range_auto("\\."))) +
  #Title
  ggtitle(names(llt_ldl_cat_list)[i]) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(angle = angles_vector, size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(2, "cm")
        ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    xlim = c(0, 1.08)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) -> intensification_prop_fig


#Predicted risks
ggsave(intensification_prop_fig,
       filename = paste0("Figures/Figure 5 [not used", LETTERS[i], "].pdf"),
       dpi = 600,
       width = 16, height = 9
       )

intensification_prop_fig
         
         
       }
       
       ) -> intensification_prop_fig_list

names(intensification_prop_fig_list) <- names(llt_ldl_cat_list)

```

##### Combine

```{r}
library(ggpubr)
grid_2by2 <- function(width) {
  
  hrzl_coords = c(0.5, 0.5, 0, 1, 0, 1)
  vert_coords = c(0.04, 1, 0.52, 0.52, 0.04, 0.04)
  line_id = c(1, 1, 2, 2, 3, 3)
  grid.polygon(hrzl_coords, vert_coords, line_id, gp = gpar(lwd = width))
}

#Labels
fig5_labels <- paste0("[", LETTERS[1:4], "] ", names(llt_ldl_cat_list))

#Plot
ggarrange(intensification_prop_fig_list$ASCVD + rescale_ggplot, 
          intensification_prop_fig_list$`DM without ASCVD` + rescale_ggplot,
          intensification_prop_fig_list$`LDL-C of 190 mg/dL or greater without ASCVD or DM`  + rescale_ggplot,
          intensification_prop_fig_list$`PREVENT-based 10-year ASCVD risk of 5% or greater` + rescale_ggplot, 
          labels = fig5_labels,
          ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
          font.label = list(size = 13),
          common.legend = T,
          legend = "bottom",
          hjust = -0.01)

grid_2by2(width = 3)
fig5_unused <- grid.grab()
ggsave(fig5_unused,
       filename = paste0("Figures/Figure 5 [unused].pdf"),
       device = cairo_pdf,
       width = 16,
       height = 9,
       dpi = 600)


```


##### Plot [used]

```{r}

#Collate in single df
lapply(1:length(llt_ldl_cat_list), 
       function(i) llt_ldl_cat_list[[i]][1:4,] %>% mutate(type = names(llt_ldl_cat_list)[i])) %>%
  rbindlist -> llt_ldl_cat_overall_df

#Reorder levels
llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[, value := fct_relevel(value, c(
  "LDL-C <55 mg/dL",
  "LDL-C 55-69 mg/dL",
  "LDL-C 70-99 mg/dL",
  "LDL-C of 100 mg/dL or greater" ))]

llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[order(value)] -> llt_ldl_cat_overall_df

#Create geom_text aestetics
llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[, geom_text_pos := c(0, prop_pe[1], prop_pe[1] + prop_pe[2],  prop_pe[1] + prop_pe[2] + prop_pe[3]), 
               by = type]
llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[, diff(geom_text_pos), by = type]

llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[, diff(geom_text_pos)]
llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[, geom_text_label := 
                 paste0(percent(prop_pe, 0.1),
                        " (", pe %>% tomil, "m)")]
llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[, geom_text_label := str_replace(geom_text_label, "0.0m", "<0.1m")]
llt_ldl_cat_overall_df <- llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[round(prop_pe*100) == 0, geom_text_label := ""]
llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[, geom_text_pos := {
  x <- geom_text_pos
  space_adj = 0.05
  for (i in 2:.N) {
    if ( ((x[i] - x[i-1]) < 0.06) & x[i] > 0.01) {
      x[i] <- x[i-1] + 0.06
    }
  }
  x
}, by = type]

llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[, geom_text_pos := cumsum(prop_pe) - prop_pe / 2, by = .(type)]

#llt_goal_need_ldl_cat_df[, value := droplevels(value)]
#llt_goal_need_ldl_cat_df[geom_text_label  %>% str_detect("0% \\[0"), geom_text_label := ""]
#llt_goal_need_ldl_cat_df[pe < 1e05 & prop_pe > 0.005, geom_text_label := paste0(percent(prop_pe, 1), " [", round(pe/1e6, 2), "m]")]
#Angles vector
angles_vector <- c(0)


label_size <- 5

#Wrap text for fit
llt_ldl_cat_overall_df[, type_wrap := str_wrap(type, width = 40)]
#Plot
ggplot(data = llt_ldl_cat_overall_df,
       aes(y = prop_pe,
           x = type,
           fill = value
       )) +
  geom_col(position = position_stack(reverse = T),
           width = 0.7,
           color = "black",
           show.legend = T) +
  geom_text(vjust = -0.1, fontface = "bold", size = 7,
            aes(y = geom_text_pos,
                label = geom_text_label)) +
  facet_grid(. ~ type_wrap, scales = "free") +
  #Plot scales
  scale_x_discrete(name = NULL, labels = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Proportion (%)",
                     breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.05),
                     expand = c(0, 0),
                     labels = function(x) (x * 100),
                     sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = NULL,
                    values = palette_map,
                    drop = F
  ) +
  #Title
  ggtitle(NULL) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(title = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
        plot.subtitle = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11, hjust = 0.0, color = "grey45"),
        text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 18, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(angle = angles_vector, size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.key = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 17, face = "bold"),
        legend.key.width = unit(3, "cm"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(
    ylim = c(0, 1.08)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1)) -> fig5


#Predicted risks
ggsave(fig5,
       filename = paste0("Figures/Figure 5.pdf"),
       dpi = 600,
       device = cairo_pdf,
       width = 16, height = 9
)




```


###Total LDL-C/non-HDL-C

#####Calculate

```{r}
get_svytotals_mod(design = subset(sdata, new_1 == "yes"),
              var = ~ goal_need, 
              n_cats = 4) -> goal_need_cat_df

```


#####Tabulate

```{r}

goal_need_cat_df[, prop_pe_ci := make_prop_pe_ci(prop_pe, prop_lci, prop_uci)]
goal_need_cat_df[, prop_pe_ci_pct := make_prop_pe_ci_pct(prop_pe, prop_lci, prop_uci)]
goal_need_cat_df[, prop_pe_ci_pct := make_prop_pe_ci_pct(prop_pe, prop_lci, prop_uci)]
goal_need_cat_df[, pe_ci := make_pe_ci_mil(pe, lci, uci)]

goal_need_cat_df[, stratum := fct_relevel(stratum, levels = unique(goal_need_cat_df$stratum))]
goal_need_cat_df <- goal_need_cat_df[order(stratum)]
flextable(goal_need_cat_df[, .(`Variable` = group,
                            `Strata` = stratum,
                            `Category` = value,
                            `Proportion [95% CI], %` = prop_pe_ci,
                            `Number [95% CI], millions` = pe_ci)]) %>%
  bold(j = c(1, 2)) %>%
  
    add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("LDL-C: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol; Non-HDL-C: Non-high-density lipoprotein cholesterol; NH: Non-Hispanic"),
                 colwidths = 5) %>%
  flextable_aes(table_title = "Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant] Goal attainment of low-denisty and non-high-density lipoprotein cholesterol among US adults with a class I treatment indication per the 2026 ACC/AHA Dysylipidemia Guideline (including those yet to initiate pharmacotherapy).") %>%
  merge_v() %>%
  add_footer_lines(values = as_paragraph(abbs_line)) -> goal_need_cat_t
  save_as_docx(goal_need_cat_t, path = "Tables/Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant].docx")
  

```

###Tabulate LDL/non-HDL eligiblity

```{r}


#Three treatment goals
three_groups <- c(
  "Goal LDL-C/non-HDL-C <55/85 mg/dL" = expression(goal_55_85 == 1),
  "Goal LDL-C/non-HDL-C <70/100 mg/dL" = expression(goal_55_85 == 0 & goal_70_100 == 1),
  "Goal LDL-C/non-HDL-C <100/130 mg/dL" = expression(goal_55_85 == 0 & goal_70_100 == 0 & goal_100_130 == 1)
)

#Loop
lapply(1:length(three_groups),
       function(i) {
         svytotal_df(design = subset(sdata, eval(three_groups[[i]]) & llt == "yes"),
                     var = ~ goal_need_ldl_non_hdl
         ) -> df
         
         df[, goal := names(three_groups[i])]
         
         df[, n_respondents := subset(sdata, eval(three_groups[[i]]) & llt == "yes")$variables[, .N]]
       }
) %>%
  rbindlist -> goal_need_ldl_non_hdl_df

#Relevel factors
goal_need_ldl_non_hdl_df[, value := fct_relevel(
  value,
  c("Meets both LDL-C and non-HDL-C goal",
    "Meets LDL-C but not non-HDL-C goal",
    "Does not meet LDL-C goal")
)]
goal_need_ldl_non_hdl_df[, goal := fct_relevel(goal, 
                                       "Goal LDL-C/non-HDL-C <100/130 mg/dL",
                                       "Goal LDL-C/non-HDL-C <70/100 mg/dL",
                                       "Goal LDL-C/non-HDL-C <55/85 mg/dL")]
#Reorder
setorder(goal_need_ldl_non_hdl_df, goal, value)

#Tabulate
flextable(goal_need_ldl_non_hdl_df[, .(`Treatment goal` = goal,
                                       `Respondents, N` = n_respondents,
                                        `Goal Attainment` = value,
                                        `Proportion [95% CI], %` = prop_pe_ci,
                                        `Number [95% CI], millions` = pe_ci)]) %>%
  bold(j = c(1, 2)) %>%
    add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("LDL-C: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol; Non-HDL-C: Non-high-density lipoprotein cholesterol"),
                 colwidths = 5) %>%
  flextable_aes(table_title = "Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant] Goal attainment of low-density and non-high-density lipoprotein cholesterol among US adults with a class I treatment indication per the 2026 ACC/AHA Dysylipidemia Guideline among those on pharmacotherapy, stratified by treatment goal.") %>%
  merge_v() %>%
  add_footer_lines(values = as_paragraph(abbs_line)) -> goal_need_ldl_non_hdl_t
  save_as_docx(goal_need_ldl_non_hdl_t, path = "Tables/Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant].docx")




```

#### Tabulate LDL/ApoB

```{r}

#Use ApoB weights to create survey object
sdata_apo_b <- svydesign(data = data,
                       ids = data$SDMVPSU,
                       strata = data$SDMVSTRA,
                       weights = data$weight_apob,
                       nest = TRUE)


#Three treatment goals
three_groups <- c(
  "Goal LDL-C/apoB goal <55/55 mg/dL " = expression(goal_55_85 == 1),
  "Goal LDL-C/apoB <70/70 mg/dL" = expression(goal_55_85 == 0 & goal_70_100 == 1),
  "Goal LDL-C/apoB <100/90 mg/dL" = expression(goal_55_85 == 0 & goal_70_100 == 0 & goal_100_130 == 1)
)

#Three treatment goals
#Loop
lapply(1:length(three_groups),
       function(i) {
         svytotal_df(design = subset(sdata, eval(three_groups[[i]]) & llt == "yes"),
                     var = ~ goal_need_ldl_apo_b
         ) -> df
         
         df[, goal := names(three_groups[i])]
         
         df[, n_respondents := subset(sdata, eval(three_groups[[i]]) & llt == "yes")$variables[, .N]]
       }
) %>%
  rbindlist -> goal_need_ldl_apo_b_df

#Relevel factors
goal_need_ldl_apo_b_df[, value := fct_relevel(
  value,
  c("Meets both LDL-C and apoB goal",
    "Meets LDL-C but not apoB goal",
    "Does not meet LDL-C goal")
)]

#Reorder
setorder(goal_need_ldl_apo_b_df, goal, value)

#Tabulate
flextable(goal_need_ldl_apo_b_df[, .(`Treatment goal` = goal,
                                       `Respondents, N` = n_respondents,
                                       
                                       `Goal Attainment` = value,
                                       `Proportion [95% CI], %` = prop_pe_ci,
                                       `Number [95% CI], millions` = pe_ci)]) %>%
  bold(j = c(1, 2)) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("LDL-C: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol; apoB: Apolipoprotein B"),
                 colwidths = 5) %>%
  flextable_aes(table_title = "Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant]. Goal attainment of low-density and apoB among US adults with a class I treatment indication per the 2026 ACC/AHA Dysylipidemia Guideline among those on pharmacotherapy, stratified by treatment goal.") %>%
  merge_v() %>%
  add_footer_lines(values = as_paragraph(abbs_line)) -> goal_need_ldl_apo_b_t
  save_as_docx(goal_need_ldl_apo_b_t, path = "Tables/Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant].docx")

```

#### Tabulate LDL/non-HDL-C/ApoB


```{r}

#Use ApoB weights to create survey object
sdata_apo_b <- svydesign(data = data,
                       ids = data$SDMVPSU,
                       strata = data$SDMVSTRA,
                       weights = data$weight_apob,
                       nest = TRUE)
sdata_apo_b <- subset(sdata_apo_b, age >= 20 & llt == "yes" & new_1 == "yes")


#Three treatment goals
three_groups <- c(
  "Overall" = expression(new_1 == "yes"),
  "Goal LDL-C/non-HDL-C/apoB goal <55/85/55 mg/dL" = expression(goal_55_85 == 1 & new_1 == "yes"),
  "Goal LDL-C/non-HDL-C/apoB <70/100/70 mg/dL" = expression(goal_55_85 == 0 & goal_70_100 == 1 & new_1 == "yes"),
  "Goal LDL-C/non-HDL-C/apoB <100/130/90 mg/dL" = expression(goal_55_85 == 0 & goal_70_100 == 0 & goal_100_130 == 1 & new_1 == "yes")
)

#Three treatment goals
#Loop
lapply(1:length(three_groups),
       function(i) {
         svytotal_df(design = subset(sdata_apo_b, eval(three_groups[[i]]) & llt == "yes"),
                     var = ~ goal_need_3
         ) -> df
         
         
         
         #Merge to add N of respondents
         merge(df,
               subset(sdata_apo_b, eval(three_groups[[i]]) & llt == "yes")$variables[, .(n_respondents = .N), by = goal_need_3], 
               
               by.y = "goal_need_3", by.x = "value"
               ) -> df
         
         #Add N of adults
         df[, n_adults := pe %>% comma]
         
         #Totals
         df[, total_n_respondents := subset(sdata_apo_b, eval(three_groups[[i]]) & llt == "yes")$variables[, .N]]
         df[, total_n_adults := subset(sdata_apo_b, eval(three_groups[[i]]) & llt == "yes")$variables[, sum(weight_apob) %>% comma]]
         
         
         #Missing rows
         if(nrow(df) < 4) {
           data.table(var = "goal_need_3",
                      value = data[,  unique(goal_need_3 %>% na.omit)[unique(goal_need_3 %>% na.omit) %nin% df$value]],
                                     pe = 0, lci = 0, uci = 0,
                                     prop_pe = 0, prop_lci = 0, prop_uci = 0, pe_ci = 0, prop_pe_ci = 0, prop_pe_ci_pct = 0, n_adults = 0, n_respondents = 0,
                      total_n_respondents = 0, total_n_adults = 0) -> add_df
          
           df <- rbind(df, add_df) 
         }
         
         
         
         
         #Gaol
         df[, goal := names(three_groups[i])]
         
         df
       }
) %>%
  rbindlist -> goal_need_3_df

#Relevel factors
goal_need_3_df[, value := fct_relevel(
  value,
  c("Meets LDL-C, non-HDL-C, and apoB goals",
    "Meets LDL-C and non-HDL-C but not apoB goal",
    "Meets LDL-C but not non-HDL-C goal" ,
    "Does not meet LDL-C goal")
)]

goal_need_3_df[, goal := fct_relevel(
  goal,
  c("Overall",
    goal_need_3_df[goal != "Overall", unique(goal)])
)]

#Reorder
setorder(goal_need_3_df, goal, -value)

#Tabulate
flextable(goal_need_3_df[, .(`Treatment goal` = goal,
                                       `Goal Attainment` = value,
                              `Number of Respondents` = n_respondents,
                             `Number of US adults` = n_adults,
                                       
                                       `Proportion [95% CI], %` = prop_pe_ci,
                                       `Number [95% CI], millions` = pe_ci)]) %>%
  bold(j = c(1, 2)) %>%
    merge_v() %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("LDL-C: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol; non-HDL-C: non-high-density lipoprotein cholesterol; apoB: Apolipoprotein B"),
                 colwidths = 6) %>%
  footnote(i = 5, j = 1, ref_symbols = "*",  
           value = as_paragraph("Includes class I indications for patients with a PREVENT-based score of 5 to 10% and DM  or pre-treatment LDL ≥190mg/dL without risk-enhancing factors.")) %>%
    footnote(i = 9, j = 1, ref_symbols = "**",  
           value = as_paragraph("Includes class I indications for patients with a PREVENT-based score of ≥10%, DM or pre-treatment LDL ≥190mg/dL with risk-enhancing factors, or ASCVD that is not at very high risk.")) %>%
      footnote(i = 13, j = 1, ref_symbols = "***",  
           value = as_paragraph("Includes class I indications for patients with ASCVD at very high risk.")) %>%
  flextable_aes(table_title = "Table 5. Goal attainment of low-density lipoprotein cholesterol, non-high-density lipoprotein cholesterol, and apolipoproteinB among US adults with a class I treatment indication per the 2026 ACC/AHA Dysylipidemia Guideline among those on pharmacotherapy, stratified by treatment goal.") %>%
  width(width = c(1.5, 1 %>% rep(3), 1.5, 1.5)) -> goal_need_3_t

#Save
  save_as_docx(goal_need_3_t, path = "Tables/Table 5.docx")

```


###Use of LLT

```{r}
sdata_ldl$variables[new_1 == "yes"][llt == "yes", sum(weight_ldl) %>% comma]
sdata_ldl$variables[new_1 == "yes"][llt == "yes" & statin == "yes", sum(weight_ldl)/sdata_ldl$variables[new_1 == "yes"][llt == "yes", sum(weight_ldl)]]
sdata_ldl$variables[new_1 == "yes"][llt == "yes" & ezetimibe == "yes", sum(weight_ldl)/sdata_ldl$variables[new_1 == "yes"][llt == "yes", sum(weight_ldl)]]
sdata_ldl$variables[new_1 == "yes"][llt == "yes" & pcsk9 == "yes", sum(weight_ldl)/sdata_ldl$variables[new_1 == "yes"][llt == "yes", sum(weight_ldl)]]


group_filters <- list(
  expr(ascvd == "yes"),
  expr(dm == "yes" & ascvd == "no"),
  expr(pre_ttt_ldl >= 190 & dm == "no" & ascvd == "no"),
  expr(dm == "no" & ascvd == "no" & pre_ttt_ldl < 190 & new_1 == "yes")
)
names(group_filters) <- c("ASCVD", "DM", "Pre-treatment LDL of 190 mg/dL or greater", "Primary prevention")

lapply(1:length(group_filters),
       function(i)
         data.table(
           group = names(group_filters)[i],
           n_total = sdata$variables[eval(group_filters[[i]]), sum(weight) %>% tomil],
           n_llt = sdata_ldl$variables[llt == "yes" & eval(group_filters[[i]]), sum(weight_ldl) %>% tomil],
           pct_llt = sdata_ldl$variables[eval(group_filters[[i]]),  sum(weight_ldl[llt == "yes"])/sdata$variables[eval(group_filters[[i]]), sum(weight)]]  %>% {r1(.*100)},
           median_ldl_overall = sdata_ldl$variables[eval(group_filters[[i]]), wtd_median_iqr(ldl, weight_ldl)],
           median_ldl_llt = sdata_ldl$variables[llt == "yes" & eval(group_filters[[i]]), wtd_median_iqr(ldl, weight_ldl)]
         )
       ) %>% rbindlist -> llt_use_df


flextable(llt_use_df[, .(`Group` = group,
                               `Number of adults, millions` = n_total,
                               `Number of adults on lipid-lowering therapy, millions` = n_llt,
                               `Proportion on lipid lowering therapy, %` = pct_llt,
                               `Overall median LDL-C (Interquartile range), mg/dL` = median_ldl_overall,
                         `On-treatment Median LDL-C (Interquartile range), mg/dL` = median_ldl_overall)]) %>%
  bold(j = c(1, 2)) %>%
  
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("ASCVD: Atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease; DM: Diabetes mellitus; LDL-C: Low-density lipoprotein cholesterol"),
                 colwidths = 6) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("Diabetes was defined by an HbA1c ≥6.5%, fasting glucose ≥126mg/dL, a self-reported history of diabetes, or use of medications specific to diabetes. ASCVD was defined by a self-reported history of myocardial infarction, coronary heart disease, angina, or stroke"),
                 colwidths = 6) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(abbs_line),
                 colwidths = 6) %>%
  flextable_aes(table_title = "Supplementary Table 7. Utilization of lipid-lowering treatments and low-density lipoprotein cholesterol levels by treatment indication") %>%
  merge_v() %>%
  flextable::width(width = 1.2) -> llt_use_t
  save_as_docx(llt_use_t, path = "Tables/Supplementary Table 7.docx")

```

##E. Variables by discordance

### Overall

```{r}
get_svytotals(design = subset(sdata, llt == "no"),
              var = ~ discordant_type, n_cats = 4) -> discordant_df

```

###Functions

```{r}
#Experiment to make sure functions work correctly
# mean_var = ~ tc
# prop_var = ~ dm
# subset_var = "discordant_type"
# subset_options = discordant_type_options
# wanted_value = "yes"



#Means
mean_t_fn <- function(filtered_design = sdata %>%
                        subset(llt == "no"), 
                      mean_var, subset_var, subset_options) {
  #Get means and CIs
lapply(subset_options,
           function(i)
           svymean_df(design = filtered_design %>%
                        subset(get(subset_var) == i), mean_var)[, pe_ci]
           ) -> m

#Formulas to run regressions and compare
form1 <- formula(paste0(paste0(mean_var)[2], " ~ 1"))
form2 <- formula(paste0(paste0(mean_var)[2], " ~ discordant_type"))


#Compare
anova(
  svyglm(design = sdata %>% 
         subset(llt == "no") %>% 
         subset(discordant_type %>% str_detect("Discordant")),
       formula = form1
       ),
  svyglm(design = sdata %>% 
         subset(llt == "no") %>% 
         subset(discordant_type %>% str_detect("Discordant")),
       formula = form2
       ),
  method = "LRT"
)$p %>% p -> p_lrt

#String together
c(m,
  p_lrt
  )
  
}

#Test
# prop_var = ~ asian;
#       subset_var = "discordant_2_type";
#       subset_options = discordant_2_type_options;
#       wanted_value = "yes"
#       filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")

#Proprotions
prop_t_fn <- function(filtered_design = sdata %>%
                        subset(llt == "no"),
                      prop_var, subset_var, subset_options, wanted_value) {
  #Get proportions
lapply(subset_options,
         function(i)
           #If 0, don't run function
           if(filtered_design$variables[llt == "no" & get(subset_var) == i, .N, by = eval(paste0(prop_var)[2])] %>% na.omit %>% nrow == 1) 0 else {
           svytotal_df(design = filtered_design %>%
                         subset(get(subset_var) == i), prop_var)[value == wanted_value, prop_pe_ci]
           }
  ) -> m


#Formulas to run regressions and compare
form1 <- formula(paste0("factor(", paste0(prop_var)[2], ")", " ~ 1"))
form2 <- formula(paste0("factor(", paste0(prop_var)[2], ")", " ~ discordant_type"))

#Compare
anova(
  svyglm(design = sdata %>% 
         subset(llt == "no") %>% 
         subset(discordant_type %>% str_detect("Discordant")),
         family = "binomial",
       formula = form1
       ),
  svyglm(design = sdata %>% 
         subset(llt == "no") %>% 
         subset(discordant_type %>% str_detect("Discordant")),
         family = "binomial",
       formula = form2
       ),
  method = "LRT"
)$p %>% p -> p_lrt

#String together
c(m,
  p_lrt
  )
}

```

###Tabulate

#### Class I

```{r}

#discordant_type_options options
discordant_type_options <- data[, levels(discordant_type)]

#Produce list
list(
  #N
```
