```{r}
  c("Respondents in NHANES, N",
    sdata$variables[llt == "no", .N %>% comma, by = discordant_type][,V1], ""),
  c("US adults, N (millions)",
    sdata$variables[llt == "no", sum(weight) %>% tomil, by = discordant_type][,V1], ""),
  c("% of US Adults ≥20 years",
    svytotal_df(design = sdata %>%
                subset(llt == "no"), ~ discordant_type)$prop_pe_ci, ""),
  #Age
  c("Age (years)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ age, 
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  #Sex
  c("Women (%)",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ sex,
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options,
              wanted_value = "female")),
  #Race
  c("Race/ethnicity (%)", "", "", "", "", ""),
  c("     Non-Hispanic Black",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ black,
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     Hispanic",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ hispanic,
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     Non-Hispanic Asian",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ asian,
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
    c("     Non-Hispanic White",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ white,
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     Other races and ethnicities (including multiracial)",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ other,
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  #Parameters
    #Cholesterol
  c("Total cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ tc, 
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  c("HDL cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ hdl, 
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  c("Non-HDL cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ eval(tc - hdl), 
              subset_var = "discordant_type",
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  c("LDL cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ eval(ldl), 
              subset_var = "discordant_type",
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  #SBP
  c("Systolic blood pressure (mm Hg)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ sbp, 
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  #DBP
  c("Diastolic blood pressure (mm Hg)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ dbp, 
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  #BMI
  c("BMI (kg/m²)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ bmi, 
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  #HbA1c
  c("HbA1c (%)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ hba1c, 
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  #Risk
  c("PCE 10-year ASCVD risk, %",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ eval(100*pce_10yr), 
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  c("PREVENT 10-year ASCVD risk, %",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ eval(100*prevent_10yr), 
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  c("PREVENT 30-year ASCVD risk, %",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ eval(100*prevent_30yr), 
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options)
  ),
  #CV RFs
  c("Cardiovascular risk factors (%)", " ", " ", " ", "", ""),
  c("     Obesity (%)",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ obesity,
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     CKD (%)",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ ckd,
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     Diabetes (%)",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ dm,
              subset_var = "discordant_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     ASCVD (%)",
    svytotal_df(sdata %>% subset(discordant_type == discordant_type_options[1]), ~ ascvd)[value == "yes", prop_pe_ci],
    svytotal_df(sdata %>% subset(discordant_type == discordant_type_options[2]), ~ ascvd)[value == "yes", prop_pe_ci],
    "N/A", "N/A", "N/A")
) -> disc_t_rfs_list
  




disc_t_rfs_list %>%
#Convert to a vector
  unlist %>%
  str_replace(" to  ", " to ") %>%
  #Morph into a table
  matrix(.,
         ncol = 6,
         byrow = T) %>%
  data.table -> disc_t_rfs_dt

lrt_line <- "Characteristics of individuals with discordant recommendations were compared using logistic regression, with the type of discordance (newly eligible vs newly ineligible) as the outcome variable. P values from likelihood ratio tests were obtained to determine statistical significance."


#Name columns
setnames(disc_t_rfs_dt,
         c("Variable", 
           "Eligible by both Guidelines",
           "Ineligible by both Guidelines",
           "Newly eligible",
           "No longer eligible",
           "P-value*"))

disc_t_rfs_dt %>%
  flextable %>%
  bold(j = c(1)) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(lrt_line), colwidths = 6) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("Values are presented as survey-weighted means (for continuous variables) and proportions (for categorical variables) with 95% confidence intervals."), colwidths = 6) %>%
    add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(explanation_line), colwidths = 6) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(paste0(abbs_line, "; PCE: Pooled Cohort Equations; PREVENT: Predicting Risk of Cardiovascular Disease Events." )), colwidths = 6) %>%
  flextable_aes(table_title = "Table 3. Characteristics of US adults according to the concordance or discordance of 2018 and 2026 ACC/AHA dyslipidemia Guidelines for the initiation of pharmacological treatment.") %>%
  add_header_row(values = c("", "Concordant", "Discordant"),
                 colwidths = c(1, 2, 3)
                 ) %>%
  
  align(align = "left") %>%
  fontsize(size = 10) %>%
  flextable::width(width = c(1.8, 1.3 %>% rep(4), 0.7)) %>%
    merge_h() -> disc_t_rfs_t
  save_as_docx(disc_t_rfs_t, path = "Tables/Table 3.docx")


```

#### Class I/II

```{r}

#discordant_12_type_options options
discordant_12_type_options <- data[, levels(discordant_12_type)]
setorder(sdata$variables, discordant_12_type)

#Produce list
list(
  #N
  c("Respondents in NHANES, N",
    sdata$variables[llt == "no", .N %>% comma, by = discordant_12_type][,V1], ""),
  c("US adults, N (millions)",
    sdata$variables[llt == "no", sum(weight) %>% tomil, by = discordant_12_type][,V1], ""),
  c("% of US Adults ≥20 years",
    svytotal_df(design = sdata %>%
                  subset(llt == "no"), ~ discordant_12_type)$prop_pe_ci, ""),
  #Age
  c("Age (years)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ age, 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  #Sex
  c("Women (%)",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ sex,
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options,
              wanted_value = "female")),
  #Race
  c("Race/ethnicity (%)", "", "", "", "", ""),
  c("     Non-Hispanic Black",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ black,
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     Hispanic",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ hispanic,
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     Non-Hispanic Asian",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ asian,
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     Non-Hispanic White",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ white,
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     Other races and ethnicities (including multiracial)",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ other,
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  #Parameters
  #Cholesterol
  c("Total cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ tc, 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  c("HDL cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ hdl, 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  c("Non-HDL cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ eval(tc - hdl), 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type",
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  c("LDL cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ eval(ldl), 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type",
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  #SBP
  c("Systolic blood pressure (mm Hg)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ sbp, 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  #DBP
  c("Diastolic blood pressure (mm Hg)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ dbp, 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  #BMI
  c("BMI (kg/m²)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ bmi, 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  #HbA1c
  c("HbA1c (%)",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ hba1c, 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  #Risk
  c("PCE 10-year ASCVD risk, %",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ eval(100*pce_10yr), 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  c("PREVENT 10-year ASCVD risk, %",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ eval(100*prevent_10yr), 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  c("PREVENT 30-year ASCVD risk, %",
    mean_t_fn(mean_var = ~ eval(100*prevent_30yr), 
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options)
  ),
  #CV RFs
  c("Cardiovascular risk factors (%)", " ", " ", " ", "", ""),
  c("     Obesity (%)",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ obesity,
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     CKD (%)",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ ckd,
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     Diabetes (%)",
    prop_t_fn(prop_var = ~ dm,
              subset_var = "discordant_12_type", 
              subset_options = discordant_12_type_options,
              wanted_value = "yes")),
  c("     ASCVD (%)",
    svytotal_df(sdata %>% subset(discordant_12_type == discordant_12_type_options[1]), ~ ascvd)[value == "yes", prop_pe_ci],
    svytotal_df(sdata %>% subset(discordant_12_type == discordant_12_type_options[2]), ~ ascvd)[value == "yes", prop_pe_ci],
    "N/A", "N/A", "N/A")
) -> disc_12_t_rfs_list


disc_12_t_rfs_list %>%
  #Convert to a vector
  unlist %>%
  str_replace(" to  ", " to ") %>%
  #Morph into a table
  matrix(.,
         ncol = 6,
         byrow = T) %>%
  data.table -> disc_12_t_rfs_dt

#Name columns
setnames(disc_12_t_rfs_dt,
         c("Variable", 
           "Eligible by both Guidelines",
           "Ineligible by both Guidelines",
           "Newly eligible",
           "No longer eligible",
           "P-value*"))

disc_12_t_rfs_dt %>%
  flextable %>%
  bold(j = c(1)) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(lrt_line), colwidths = 6) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("Values are presented as survey-weighted means (for continuous variables) and proportions (for categorical variables) with 95% confidence intervals."), colwidths = 6) %>%
    add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("*Comparing  means/proportions in newly eligible vs newly ineligible persons"), colwidths = 6) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("Values are presented as survey-weighted means (for continuous variables) and proportions (for categorical variables) with 95% confidence intervals."), colwidths = 6) %>%
    add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(explanation_line), colwidths = 6) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(paste0(abbs_line, "; PCE: Pooled Cohort Equations; PREVENT: Predicting Risk of Cardiovascular Disease Events." )), colwidths = 6) %>%
  flextable_aes(table_title = "Table 4. Characteristics of US adults according to the concordance or discordance of class I or II recommendations by the 2018 and 2026 ACC/AHA dyslipidemia Guidelines for the initiation of pharmacological treatment.") %>%
  align(align = "left") %>%
  fontsize(size = 10) %>%
  flextable::width(width = c(1.8, 1.3 %>% rep(4), 0.7)) %>%
  merge_h() -> disc_12_t_rfs
  save_as_docx(disc_12_t_rfs, path = "Tables/Table 4.docx")


```

#### II only

```{r}
#discordant_2_type_options options
discordant_2_type_options <- data[, levels(discordant_2_type)]

#Produce list
list(
  #N
  c("Respondents in NHANES, N",
    sdata$variables[llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no", .N %>% comma, by = discordant_2_type][,V1], ""),
  c("US adults, N (millions)",
    sdata$variables[llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no", sum(weight) %>% tomil, by = discordant_2_type][,V1], ""),
  c("% of US Adults ≥20 years",
    svytotal_df(design = sdata %>%
                  subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no"), ~ discordant_2_type)$prop_pe_ci, ""),
  #Age
  c("Age (years)",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ age, 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  #Sex
  c("Women (%)",
    prop_t_fn(
      prop_var = ~ sex,
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      wanted_value = "female",
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  #Race
  c("Race/ethnicity (%)", "", "", "", "", ""),
  c("     Non-Hispanic Black",
    prop_t_fn(
      prop_var = ~ black,
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      wanted_value = "yes",
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("     Hispanic",
    prop_t_fn(
      prop_var = ~ hispanic,
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      wanted_value = "yes",
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("     Non-Hispanic Asian",
    prop_t_fn(
      prop_var = ~ asian,
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      wanted_value = "yes",
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("     Non-Hispanic White",
    prop_t_fn(
      prop_var = ~ white,
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      wanted_value = "yes",
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("     Other races and ethnicities (including multiracial)",
    prop_t_fn(
      prop_var = ~ other,
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      wanted_value = "yes",
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  #Parameters
  #Cholesterol
  c("Total cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ tc, 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("HDL cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ hdl, 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("Non-HDL cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ eval(tc - hdl), 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type",
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("LDL cholesterol (mg/dL)",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ eval(ldl), 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type",
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  #SBP
  c("Systolic blood pressure (mm Hg)",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ sbp, 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  #DBP
  c("Diastolic blood pressure (mm Hg)",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ dbp, 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  #BMI
  c("BMI (kg/m²)",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ bmi, 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  #HbA1c
  c("HbA1c (%)",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ hba1c, 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  #Risk
  c("PCE 10-year ASCVD risk, %",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ eval(100*pce_10yr), 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("PREVENT 10-year ASCVD risk, %",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ eval(100*prevent_10yr), 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("PREVENT 30-year ASCVD risk, %",
    mean_t_fn(
      mean_var = ~ eval(100*prevent_30yr), 
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  #CV RFs
  c("Cardiovascular risk factors (%)", " ", " ", " ", "", ""),
  c("     Obesity (%)",
    prop_t_fn(
      prop_var = ~ obesity,
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      wanted_value = "yes",
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("     CKD (%)",
    prop_t_fn(
      prop_var = ~ ckd,
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      wanted_value = "yes",
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("     Diabetes (%)",
    prop_t_fn(
      prop_var = ~ dm,
      subset_var = "discordant_2_type", 
      subset_options = discordant_2_type_options,
      wanted_value = "yes",
      filtered_design = sdata %>% subset(llt == "no" & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no")
    )
  ),
  c("     ASCVD (%)",
    svytotal_df(
      sdata %>% subset(discordant_2_type == discordant_2_type_options[1] & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no"), 
      ~ ascvd
    )[value == "yes", prop_pe_ci],
    svytotal_df(
      sdata %>% subset(discordant_2_type == discordant_2_type_options[2] & new_1 == "no" & old_1 == "no"), 
      ~ ascvd
    )[value == "yes", prop_pe_ci],
    "N/A", "N/A", "N/A"
  )
) -> disc_2_t_rfs_list


disc_2_t_rfs_list %>%
  #Convert to a vector
  unlist %>%
  str_replace(" to  ", " to ") %>%
  #Morph into a table
  matrix(.,
         ncol = 6,
         byrow = T) %>%
  data.table -> disc_2_t_rfs_dt

#Name columns
setnames(disc_2_t_rfs_dt,
         c("Variable", 
           "Eligible by both Guideline",
           "Ineligible by both Guideline",
           "Newly eligible",
           "No longer eligible",
           "P-value*"))

disc_2_t_rfs_dt %>%
  flextable %>%
  bold(j = c(1)) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(lrt_line), colwidths = 6) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph("Values are presented as survey-weighted means (for continuous variables) and proportions (for categorical variables) with 95% confidence intervals."), colwidths = 6) %>%
    add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(explanation_line), colwidths = 6) %>%
  add_footer_row(values = as_paragraph(paste0(abbs_line, "; PCE: Pooled Cohort Equations; PREVENT: Predicting Risk of Cardiovascular Disease Events." )), colwidths = 6) %>%
  flextable_aes(table_title = "Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant]. Characteristics of US adults according to the concordance or discordance of class II recommendations by the 2018 and 2026 ACC/AHA dyslipidemia Guidelines for the initiation of pharmacological treatment.") %>%
  align(align = "left") %>%
  fontsize(size = 10) %>%
  flextable::width(width = c(1.8, 1.3 %>% rep(4), 0.7)) %>%
  merge_h() -> disc_2_t_rfs

  save_as_docx(disc_2_t_rfs, path = "Tables/Supplementary Table XXX [Redundant].docx")


```

##Produce Tables
```{r}


# Put all your tables in a list in the order you want them
all_tables <- list(
  t1_t_list[[1]],
  t1_t_list[[2]],
  disc_t_rfs_t,
  disc_12_t_rfs,
  goal_need_3_t,
  missing_data_t,
  baseline_table_t,
  t1_t_list[[6]],
  llt_use_t
)
library(officer)
# Initialize Word document
all_tables_doc <- read_docx()

# Loop through tables and add them with a break after each
for(tbl in all_tables) {
  all_tables_doc <- all_tables_doc %>%
    body_add_flextable(tbl) %>%
    body_add_break(pos = "after")
}
print(all_tables_doc, target = "Tables/Compiled Tables.docx")


```

# Save

```{r}
inclusion <- expr(age >= 20 & !is.na(new_1) & !is.na(old_1))
save(
  #Datasets
  data, sdata,
  #Datapoints
  old_1_df, new_1_df, 
  disc_t_rfs_dt, goal_need_cat_df,
  abs_diff_init_df,
   discordant_df, age_df, age_sex_df,
  inclusion, long_short_df, cacs_df,
  mid_aged_prop_df,
  hiv_df, hiv_sex_df, hiv_old_df,
  ratio_qs, new_2a_ldl30_df_prop,
   #Main Figures
  fig1, fig2, fig3, fig4, fig5,
  #Figure belonings
  females_ypos, females_label,
  males_label, males_ypos,
   #File
   file = "Rendering Data.RData")

```
